33510.title: Making the Invisible Visible: The Impact of Revealing Indoor Air Pollution on Behavior and Welfare
33510.zh_title: 让无形变有形：揭示室内空气污染对行为和福利的影响
33510.abstract: Exposure to ambient air pollution has been shown to be detrimental to human health and productivity, and has motivated many policies to reduce such pollution. However, given that humans spend 90% of their time indoors, it is important to understand the degree of exposure to Indoor Air Pollution (IAP), and, if high, ways to reduce it. We design and implement a field experiment in London that monitors households’ IAP and then randomly reveals their IAP in real-time. At baseline, we find that IAP is worse than ambient air pollution when residents are at home and that for 38% of the time, IAP is above World Health Organization standards. Additionally, we observe a large household income-IAP gradient, larger than the income-ambient pollution gradient, highlighting large income disparities in IAP exposure. During our field experiment, we find that the randomized revelation reduces IAP by 17% (1.9 μg/m³) overall and 34% (5 μg/m³) during occupancy time. We show that the mechanism is households using more natural ventilation as a result of the feedback (i.e., opening up doors and windows). Finally, in terms of welfare, we find that: (i) households have a willingness to pay of £4.8 ($\$6$) for every 1 μg/m ³ reduction in indoor PM2.5; (ii) households have a higher willingness to pay for mitigation than for full information; (iii) households have a price elasticity of IAP monitor demand around -0.75; and (iv) a £1 subsidy for an IAP monitor or an air purifier has an infinite marginal value of public funds, i.e., a Pareto improvement.
33510.zh_abstract: 暴露于环境空气污染已被证明对人类健康和生产效率有害，并促使许多政策减少此类污染。然而，鉴于人类90%的时间在室内度过，了解室内空气污染的暴露程度，以及如果程度高，如何减少它，就显得至关重要。我们设计并实施了一项在伦敦的实地实验，监测住户的室内空气污染，然后随机向住户实时揭示其室内空气污染水平。在基线期，我们发现当居民在家时，室内空气污染比环境空气污染更严重，并且38%的时间里室内空气污染高于世界卫生组织标准。此外，我们观察到较大的家庭收入-室内空气污染梯度，大于收入-环境空气污染梯度，突显了室内空气污染暴露方面的巨大收入差距。在我们的实地实验中，我们发现随机揭示使室内空气污染总体降低了17%（1.9 μg/m³），在有人时段降低了34%（5 μg/m³）。我们表明其机制是住户因反馈而更多地使用自然通风（即打开门窗）。最后，在福利方面，我们发现：(i) 家庭愿意为室内PM2.5每降低1 μg/m³支付4.8英镑（6美元）；(ii) 家庭对缓解措施的支付意愿高于对完整信息的支付意愿；(iii) 家庭对室内空气污染监测仪的需求价格弹性约为-0.75；(iv) 对室内空气污染监测仪或空气净化器提供1英镑补贴的公共资金边际价值为无穷大，即帕累托改进。

33509.title: Artificial Intelligence and the Labor Market
33509.zh_title: 人工智能与劳动力市场
33509.authors: Menaka Hampole, Dimitris Papanikolaou, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt, Bryan Seegmiller
33509.abstract: We use advances in natural language processing to construct new measures of workers’ task-level exposure to artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning from 2010 to 2023, capturing variation across firms, occupations, and time. Tasks with higher AI exposure subsequently experience reduced labor demand. To interpret these patterns, we develop a model that separates direct substitution from indirect reallocative effects of labor-saving technologies. Two variables summarize the impact of AI on within-firm labor demand: the mean exposure of an occupation’s tasks, which depresses demand, and the concentration of exposure in a few tasks, which offsets losses by enabling workers to reallocate effort. Using an instrument based on historical university hiring networks, we find causal evidence consistent with these predictions. Despite strong substitution at the task level, overall employment effects are modest, as reduced demand in exposed occupations is offset by productivity-driven increases in labor demand at AI-adopting firms.
33509.zh_abstract: 我们利用自然语言处理的进展，构建了2010年至2023年间工人任务层面暴露于人工智能和机器学习的新度量，捕捉了企业、职业和时间上的变化。人工智能暴露度较高的任务随后经历了劳动力需求减少。为了解释这些模式，我们开发了一个模型，将劳动节约型技术的直接替代效应与间接重新分配效应区分开来。两个变量概括了人工智能对企业内劳动力需求的影响：一个职业任务的平均暴露度（抑制需求）和暴露集中在少数任务上的程度（通过使工人能够重新分配努力来抵消损失）。利用基于历史大学招聘网络的工具变量，我们发现了与这些预测一致的因果证据。尽管在任务层面存在强烈的替代效应，但总体就业影响是适度的，因为暴露职业的需求减少被采用人工智能的企业中生产率驱动的劳动力需求增长所抵消。
33509.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E20, J01, J24, O3, O33

33508.title: Measuring Work from Home
33508.authors: Shelby R. Buckman, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
33508.abstract: Headline estimates for the extent of work from home (WFH) differ widely across U.S. surveys. The differences shrink greatly when we harmonize with respect to the WFH concept, target population, and question design. As of 2025, our preferred estimates say that WFH accounts for a quarter of paid workdays among Americans aged 20-64. The WFH rate is seven percentage points higher for workers with children under eight in the household and about two percentage points higher for women than men. Desired WFH rates exceed actual rates in every major demographic group – more so for women, workers with young children, and less educated workers.
33508.zh_abstract: 关于居家办公（WFH）程度的总体估计在美国各调查中差异很大。当我们在居家办公概念、目标人群和问题设计方面进行统一协调后，这些差异大幅缩小。截至2025年，我们的首选估计表明，在20-64岁的美国人中，居家办公占其带薪工作日的四分之一。对于家中有八岁以下子女的劳动者，其居家办公率高出七个百分点；女性的居家办公率比男性高出约两个百分点。在每个主要人口群体中，期望的居家办公率都高于实际比率——在女性、有年幼子女的劳动者以及受教育程度较低的劳动者中，这种差距更为明显。
33508.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D12, E24, J14, J21, J22

33507.title: Knightian Uncertainty and Bayesian Entrepreneurship
33507.zh_title: 奈特不确定性与贝叶斯创业
33507.abstract: This paper examines the relationship between Knightian uncertainty and Bayesian approaches to entrepreneurship. Using Bewley's formal model of uncertainty and incomplete preferences, it demonstrates that key predictions from Bayesian entrepreneurship remain robust when accounting for Knightian uncertainty, particularly regarding experimentation, venture financing, and strategic choice. The analysis shows that while Knightian uncertainty creates a more challenging decision environment, it maintains consistency with the three pillars of Bayesian entrepreneurship: heterogeneous beliefs, stronger entrepreneurial priors, and Bayesian updating. The paper also explores connections to effectuation theory, finding that formal uncertainty models can bridge different entrepreneurial methodologies.
33507.zh_abstract: 本文考察了奈特不确定性与贝叶斯创业方法之间的关系。利用Bewley关于不确定性和不完全偏好的形式化模型，本文证明了贝叶斯创业的关键预测在考虑奈特不确定性时仍然稳健，尤其是在实验、风险融资和战略选择方面。分析表明，虽然奈特不确定性创造了一个更具挑战性的决策环境，但它与贝叶斯创业的三个支柱保持一致：异质性信念、更强的创业先验以及贝叶斯更新。本文还探讨了与效果逻辑理论的联系，发现形式化的不确定性模型可以桥接不同的创业方法论。

33506.title: Long-Run Consequences of Sanctions on Russia
33506.abstract: This paper examines the long-run economic consequences of Western sanctions on Russia. Using a new framework for balanced growth path analysis, we find that the long-run declines in consumption are significantly larger when capital stocks are allowed to adjust --- 1.4 times larger for Russia and 2.2 times larger for Eastern Europe. This is contrary to the common intuition that long-run effects should be milder due to greater adjustment opportunities. In our model, Russian long-run consumption falls by 8.5%, Eastern European consumption by 2%, and Western countries' consumption by 0.3% in response to sanctions. The model also reveals important distributional effects: as capital adjusts, Russian real wages fall more than rental prices in the long run. These findings show that accounting for capital adjustment is quantitatively important when analyzing trade sanctions.
33506.zh_abstract: 本文考察了西方对俄罗斯制裁的长期经济后果。使用一个用于平衡增长路径分析的新框架，我们发现，当允许资本存量进行调整时，消费的长期下降幅度要大得多——俄罗斯为1.4倍，东欧为2.2倍。这与通常的直觉相反，即由于更大的调整机会，长期影响应该更温和。在我们的模型中，作为对制裁的回应，俄罗斯的长期消费下降8.5%，东欧消费下降2%，西方国家消费下降0.3%。该模型还揭示了重要的分配效应：随着资本的调整，俄罗斯的实际工资长期下降幅度超过租赁价格。这些发现表明，在分析贸易制裁时，考虑资本调整在数量上是重要的。
33506.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, F0, F1, F5, F51

33505.title: Firstborn Daughters and Family Structure in Sub-Saharan Africa
33505.zh_title: 撒哈拉以南非洲的头胎女儿与家庭结构
33505.abstract: Does the absence of missing baby girls in sub-Saharan Africa imply a lack of son preference in the region? This paper uncovers systematic gendered effects on family structure and fertility in sub-Saharan Africa. Using data from Demographic and Health Surveys, we show that having a firstborn daughter, rather than a son, significantly influences women’s family dynamics. Women with a female firstborn experience higher long-term marriage rates but are less likely to marry the child’s father when the birth occurs prior to formal union. They also face higher divorce rates and greater likelihood of entering polygamous unions. Despite these marital transitions, they tend to have more children. Our analysis further reveals that having a firstborn daughter is associated with poorer living standards and adverse health outcomes for mothers. To examine the mechanisms driving these patterns, we employ a geographic regression discontinuity design along ancestral ethnic borders separating matrilineal and patrilineal traditions. This approach highlights patrilineality as a key driver, shaping both marriage dynamics and fertility.
33505.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲地区没有缺失女婴的现象是否意味着该地区不存在男孩偏好？本文揭示了撒哈拉以南非洲地区家庭结构和生育率中系统性的性别效应。利用人口与健康调查的数据，我们表明，与头胎是儿子相比，头胎是女儿会显著影响女性的家庭动态。头胎是女儿的女性长期结婚率更高，但如果生育发生在正式结合之前，她们与孩子父亲结婚的可能性更低。她们还面临更高的离婚率和更大的可能性进入一夫多妻制婚姻。尽管经历了这些婚姻转变，她们往往生育更多孩子。我们的分析进一步揭示，头胎是女儿与母亲较差的生活水平和不利的健康结果相关。为了检验驱动这些模式的机制，我们沿着分隔母系和父系传统的祖先族群边界，采用地理断点回归设计。这种方法凸显了父系制是一个关键驱动因素，它同时塑造了婚姻动态和生育率。

33504.title: Long-Run Comparative Statics
33504.abstract: What are the long-run effects of permanent changes to productivities, taxes, and other economic parameters, accounting for changes in the capital stock? We show that balanced growth paths of dynamic open economies can be represented as equilibria of equivalent static economies, in which capital services are intermediate inputs subject to wedges that capture deviations from the Golden Rule of savings. Hence, tools developed for distorted static economies can be used to characterize long-run comparative statics. The long-run impact of any shock on consumption has two components. First, a mechanical technological impact captured by a cost-based Domar weight, which we show far exceeds the sales share for investment industries and their suppliers. Second, there is a resource reallocation effect, which increases consumption if it raises capital intensity, with the magnitude determined by how much the reallocation lowers the aggregate labor share. These reallocations can be quantitatively significant: tariffs, for example, generate long-run consumption losses that far exceed their static GDP impact, by reallocating resources away from capital formation. The magnitude of losses from tariffs depends primarily on the economy’s internal elasticities – such as the elasticity of substitution between capital and labor and the elasticity of household asset demand to interest rates – rather than on the trade elasticities that are central in static models.
33504.zh_abstract: 在考虑资本存量变化的情况下，生产率、税收和其他经济参数的永久性变化的长期影响是什么？我们表明，动态开放经济的平衡增长路径可以表示为等价静态经济的均衡，其中资本服务是中间投入品，并受到反映储蓄黄金律偏离的楔子影响。因此，为扭曲的静态经济开发的工具可用于刻画长期比较静态。任何冲击对消费的长期影响有两个组成部分。首先，是由基于成本的Domar权重所捕捉的机械性技术影响，我们表明该权重远远超过投资行业及其供应商的销售份额。其次，存在资源重新配置效应，如果它提高了资本密集度，则会增加消费，其大小取决于重新配置在多大程度上降低了总劳动份额。这些重新配置在数量上可能很重要：例如，关税通过将资源从资本形成中重新配置出去，产生的长期消费损失远远超过其静态GDP影响。关税损失的规模主要取决于经济体的内部弹性——例如资本与劳动之间的替代弹性以及家庭资产需求对利率的弹性——而不是静态模型中核心的贸易弹性。

33503.title: Do Temporary Cash Transfers Stimulate the Macroeconomy? Evidence from Four Case Studies
33503.zh_title: 临时现金转移支付能否刺激宏观经济？来自四个案例研究的证据
33503.abstract: This paper re-evaluates the effectiveness of temporary transfers in stimulating the macroeconomy using evidence from four case studies. The rebirth of Keynesian stabilization policy has lingering costs in terms of higher debt paths, so it is important to assess the benefits of these policies. In each case study, I analyze whether the behavior of the aggregate data is consistent with the transfers providing an effective stimulus. Two of the case studies are reviews of evidence from my recent work on the 2001 and 2008 U.S. tax rebates. The other two case studies are new analyses of temporary transfers in Singapore and Australia. In all four instances, the evidence suggests that temporary cash transfers to households likely provided little or no stimulus to the macroeconomy.
33503.zh_abstract: 本文利用四个案例研究的证据，重新评估了临时转移支付在刺激宏观经济方面的有效性。凯恩斯主义稳定政策的复兴带来了更高的债务路径等持续成本，因此评估这些政策的收益非常重要。在每个案例研究中，我分析了总体数据的行为是否与转移支付提供了有效刺激相一致。其中两个案例研究是对我近期关于2001年和2008年美国税收返还工作的证据回顾。另外两个案例研究是对新加坡和澳大利亚临时转移支付的新分析。在所有四个案例中，证据表明，向家庭提供的临时现金转移支付可能对宏观经济几乎没有或根本没有提供刺激。

33502.title: The Social and Statistical Construction of Race
33502.zh_title: 种族的社会建构与统计建构
33502.authors: Anjali Adukia, Richard Hornbeck, Daniel Keniston, Benjamin Lualdi
33502.abstract: We examine the social construction of race in the United States, from Reconstruction to the modern day, and show how this affects statistical differences across and within racial categories. During the Reconstruction era, people with the same light brown skin tones, recorded by the Freedman’s Bank (1865-1874), were more likely racialized as White or Mulatto in the 1870 Census if they were wealthier or literate. Racial assignment of descendants remained fluid through the 1940 Census. In modern data, self-reported race also varies with income and college completion among people with light brown skin tones. This endogenous racial assignment increases cross-race wealth gaps, which we show can be adjusted using sub-samples with data on skin tone or ancestry. Endogenous race also induces selection when controlling for race that, for example, attenuates the relationship between wealth and skin tone.\n
33502.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国从重建时期至今种族的社会建构，并展示了这如何影响种族类别内部和之间的统计差异。在重建时期，根据自由民储蓄银行（1865-1874年）的记录，具有相同浅棕色肤色的人，如果更富有或更有文化，在1870年人口普查中更有可能被归类为白人或混血儿。其后代的种族归属直到1940年人口普查仍具有流动性。在现代数据中，在浅棕色肤色人群中，自我报告的种族也随收入和大学完成情况而变化。这种内生的种族归属增加了跨种族的财富差距，我们表明可以使用具有肤色或血统数据的子样本进行调整。当控制种族时，内生种族也会引起选择偏差，例如，这会削弱财富与肤色之间的关系。
33502.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J15, N31, Z13

33501.title: Wage Fixing
33501.abstract: We model and analyze employer cartels that fix wages by committing to a wage ceiling. The setting is a frictional labor market with large employers that compete for workers via posted wages. Wage fixing reduces competition both inside and outside the cartel, leading to market-wide wage depression. Competition from outside employers disciplines the cartel and hence governs its wage impact and profitability. Consequently, wage-fixing schemes are more likely to emerge and remain stable when the labor market has slack, concentration is high, the span of control is small, product demand is elastic, and firms also collude in the product market. We describe a simple sufficient statistic to gauge the harm caused by a wage-fixing cartel.
33501.zh_abstract: 我们对通过承诺设定工资上限来固定工资的雇主卡特尔进行建模和分析。该设定是一个存在摩擦的劳动力市场，其中有大型雇主通过公布的工资来竞争工人。工资固定减少了卡特尔内部和外部的竞争，导致市场范围内的工资压低。来自外部雇主的竞争约束了卡特尔，从而决定了其工资影响和盈利能力。因此，当劳动力市场存在松弛、集中度高、控制范围小、产品需求有弹性且企业也在产品市场合谋时，工资固定方案更有可能出现并保持稳定。我们描述了一个简单的充分统计量来衡量工资固定卡特尔造成的损害。

33500.title: Inappropriate Technology: Evidence from Global Agriculture
33500.zh_title: 不适宜技术：来自全球农业的证据
33500.abstract: An influential explanation for global productivity differences is that frontier technologies are adapted to the high-income countries that develop them and "inappropriate" elsewhere. We study this hypothesis in agriculture using data on novel plant varieties, patents, output, and the global range of crop pests and pathogens. Innovation focuses on the environmental conditions of technology leaders, and ecological mismatch with these markets reduces technology transfer and production. Combined with a model, our estimates imply that inappropriate technology explains 15-20% of cross-country agricultural productivity differences and re-shapes the potential consequences of innovation policy, the rise of new technology leaders, and environmental change.
33500.zh_abstract: 一个关于全球生产率差异的有影响力的解释是，前沿技术适应了开发它们的高收入国家，而在其他地方则“不适宜”。我们利用关于新型植物品种、专利、产出以及全球作物病虫害范围的数据，在农业领域研究了这一假说。创新聚焦于技术领先国家的环境条件，而与这些市场的生态错配会减少技术转移和生产。结合一个模型，我们的估计表明，不适宜技术解释了跨国农业生产率差异的15-20%，并重塑了创新政策、新技术领先者的崛起以及环境变化的潜在后果。
33500.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：O3, O33, O4, O44, Q16, Q56, Q57

33536.title: AI and the Extended Workday: Productivity, Contracting Efficiency, and Distribution of Rents
33536.zh_title: 人工智能与延长的工作日：生产率、契约效率与租金分配
33536.authors: Wei Jiang, Junyoung Park, Rachel (Jiqiu) Xiao, Shen Zhang
33536.abstract: This study investigates how occupational AI exposure impacts employment at the intensive margin, i.e., the length of workdays and the allocation of time between work and leisure. Drawing on individual-level time diary data from 2004–2023, we find that higher AI exposure—whether stemming from the ChatGPT shock or broader AI evolution—is associated with longer work hours and reduced leisure time, primarily due to AI complementing human labor rather than replacing it. This effect is particularly pronounced in contexts where AI significantly enhances marginal productivity and monitoring efficiency. It is further amplified in competitive labor and product markets, where workers have limited bargaining power to retain the benefits of productivity gains, which are often captured by consumers or firms instead. The findings question the expectation that technological advancements alleviate human labor burdens, revealing instead a paradox where such progresses compromise work-life balance.
33536.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了职业层面的人工智能暴露如何影响就业的集约边际，即工作日的长度以及工作与休闲之间的时间分配。利用2004年至2023年个体层面的时间日志数据，我们发现，更高的人工智能暴露——无论是源于ChatGPT冲击还是更广泛的人工智能演进——与更长的工作时间和更少的休闲时间相关，这主要是由于人工智能补充而非替代了人类劳动。这种效应在人工智能显著提升边际生产率和监控效率的情境中尤为突出。在竞争激烈的劳动力和产品市场中，这种效应被进一步放大，因为在这些市场中，工人议价能力有限，无法保留生产率提升带来的收益，这些收益往往被消费者或企业所获取。这些发现质疑了技术进步能减轻人类劳动负担的预期，反而揭示了一个悖论：这种进步损害了工作与生活的平衡。

33535.title: Dirty Business: Transition Risk of Factor Portfolios
33535.zh_title: 肮脏的业务：因子投资组合的转型风险
33535.authors: Ravi Jagannathan, Iwan Meier, Valeri Sokolovski
33535.abstract: Between 2016 and 2023, the top 10% of carbon-emission-intensive firms (heavy emitters) accounted for over 90% of all Scope 1 emissions from U.S. public companies. We observe that about 35% of the market capitalization of ‘Value’ portfolios, compared to 5% of ‘Growth’ portfolios, regardless of how Value and Growth are defined, was comprised of heavy emitters. When we split the Big Value portfolio into heavy- and light-emitter stocks, we find that these two portfolios had similar realized (raw and risk-adjusted) returns and expected returns, as measured by Implied Cost of Capital, suggesting limited incremental compensation for transition risk. We also find that Big Growth low-emitter stocks consistently had lower expected returns than Big Value low-emitter stocks, with the spread widening in recent years, despite similar emission levels. This indicates that factors beyond climate concerns are necessary to fully explain the superior performance of Growth stocks relative to Value stocks over the past decade.
33535.zh_abstract: 在2016年至2023年间，碳排放强度最高的前10%公司（重排放者）占美国上市公司所有范围一排放量的90%以上。我们观察到，无论价值和成长如何定义，约35%的“价值”投资组合市值由重排放者构成，而“成长”投资组合的这一比例仅为5%。当我们将大盘价值投资组合拆分为重排放和轻排放股票时，我们发现这两个投资组合具有相似的已实现（原始和风险调整后）收益率以及以隐含资本成本衡量的预期收益率，这表明对转型风险的增量补偿有限。我们还发现，尽管排放水平相似，大盘成长低排放股票的预期收益率始终低于大盘价值低排放股票，且这一差距在近年有所扩大。这表明，要完全解释过去十年成长股相对于价值股的优异表现，需要考虑气候担忧之外的因素。

33534.title: The Impact of the Out-of-Pocket Housing Expense Inflation on Household Alcohol and Tobacco Purchases
33534.zh_title: 自付住房支出通胀对家庭酒精和烟草购买的影响
33534.authors: Virat Agrawal, Richard K. Green, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
33534.abstract: Housing expense inflation has historically averaged an annual growth rate of 3.0 percent. However, starting in early 2021 housing expense inflation surged, peaking at 8.2 percent by March 2023. Substance use also increased concurrently. This study investigates the impact of rising housing expenses on household purchases of alcohol and tobacco. The relationship is ambiguous: higher housing costs could reduce spending on these items due to constrained disposable income or increase them as a coping mechanism for financial stress. To identify the effects of housing expense inflation we utilize exogenous variation in county-level housing regulations and exposure to housing expense inflation, which affects renters and homeowners differently as homeowners with fixed-rate mortgages are less impacted. In particular, we employ a difference-in-difference-in-difference (DDD) approach, comparing changes in alcohol and tobacco purchases between renters and homeowners, before and after the housing expense surge, across counties with varying housing regulation levels. Our findings reveal that a 1-unit increase in our housing regulation index—equivalent to moving from the 10th to the 90th percentile—correlates with an additional $\$28.70$ (about 15.6 percent) monthly increase in out-of-pocket housing expenses per household member for renters relative to homeowners between 2019 and 2022. This increase is also associated with a 26 to 38 percent rise in financial difficulties among renters compared to homeowners. Furthermore, the same regulatory increase corresponds to a 15.2 percent rise in monthly beer purchases per member among renters relative to homeowners in 2022 compared to 2019, driven largely by low-cost beer. However, we find no significant effect on monthly household purchases of liquor, wine, or cigarettes.
33534.zh_abstract: 住房支出通胀的历史平均年增长率为3.0%。然而，从2021年初开始，住房支出通胀飙升，到2023年3月达到8.2%的峰值。同时，物质使用也有所增加。本研究调查了住房支出上升对家庭酒精和烟草购买的影响。这种关系是不明确的：更高的住房成本可能因可支配收入受限而减少在这些项目上的支出，也可能作为应对财务压力的一种机制而增加支出。为了识别住房支出通胀的影响，我们利用了县级住房监管程度和住房支出通胀暴露度的外生变化，这对租房者和房主的影响不同，因为拥有固定利率抵押贷款的房主受到的影响较小。具体而言，我们采用了三重差分法，比较了在住房支出激增前后，不同住房监管水平县中租房者和房主之间酒精和烟草购买的变化。我们的研究结果显示，在2019年至2022年间，我们的住房监管指数每增加1个单位——相当于从第10百分位移动到第90百分位——与租房者相对于房主每户成员每月自付住房支出额外增加28.70美元（约15.6%）相关。这一增长还与租房者相对于房主财务困难程度增加26%至38%相关。此外，同样的监管增加对应于2022年相较于2019年，租房者相对于房主每月人均啤酒购买量增加15.2%，这主要由低价啤酒驱动。然而，我们发现对每月家庭购买的烈酒、葡萄酒或香烟没有显著影响。
33534.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：D1, G5, I1, I12, I3, R28

33533.title: It Takes a Village Election: Turnover and Performance in Local Bureaucracies
33533.zh_title: 需要一场乡村选举：地方官僚机构的更替与绩效
33533.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Masyhur Hilmy, Benjamin Marx, Mahvish Shaukat, Andreas Stegmann
33533.abstract: In many countries, local governments struggle with inefficiency and inaction, often perpetuated by entrenched elites. This paper examines how leadership changes affect local bureaucratic performance. Combining personnel and citizen surveys with a regression discontinuity design in a large sample of Indonesian villages, we show that electoral turnover revitalizes local bureaucracies and improves the flow of information about citizen preferences. Bureaucrats serving new leaders interact more with citizens and are less connected to past or present village officials, resulting in a more responsive village government that better incorporates citizens’ demands in policy-making. This improves local service provision, as measured in both administrative data and citizen surveys. Overall, our findings suggest that leadership turnover can mitigate elite capture and improve governance in local administrations.
33533.zh_abstract: 在许多国家，地方政府面临效率低下和行动迟缓的问题，这通常由根深蒂固的精英阶层所延续。本文研究了领导层变动如何影响地方官僚机构的绩效。结合人员与公民调查，并在印度尼西亚大量村庄样本中采用断点回归设计，我们表明选举更替能够重振地方官僚机构，并改善关于公民偏好的信息流动。服务于新领导人的官僚与公民互动更多，与过去或现任村庄官员的联系更少，从而形成一个更具回应性的村庄政府，能更好地将公民需求纳入政策制定。这改善了地方服务供给，这一点在行政数据和公民调查中均有体现。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，领导层更替可以减轻精英俘获并改善地方行政的治理水平。

33532.title: Evaluating Transport Improvements in Spatial Equilibrium
33532.zh_title: 在空间均衡中评估交通改善
33532.abstract: The recent development of quantitative urban models provides a new set of tools for evaluating transport improvements. Conventional cost-benefit analyses are typically undertaken in partial equilibrium. In contrast, quantitative urban models characterize the spatial distribution of economic activity within cities in general equilibrium. We compare evaluations of a transport improvement using conventional cost-benefit analysis, sufficient statistics approaches based on changes in market access, and model-based counterfactuals. We show that quantitative urban models predict a reorganization of economic activity within cities in response to a transport improvement, which can lead to substantial differences between the predictions of these three approaches for large changes in transport costs.
33532.zh_abstract: 定量城市模型的最新发展为评估交通改善提供了一套新工具。传统的成本效益分析通常在局部均衡中进行。相比之下，定量城市模型在一般均衡中刻画了城市内经济活动的空间分布。我们比较了使用传统成本效益分析、基于市场准入变化的充分统计量方法以及基于模型的反事实分析对交通改善的评估。我们表明，定量城市模型预测了城市内经济活动因交通改善而发生的重组，这可能导致在交通成本发生较大变化时，这三种方法的预测结果之间存在显著差异。

33531.title: The Climate Adaptation Feedback
33531.authors: Alexander C. Abajian, Tamma Carleton, Kyle C. Meng, Olivier Deschenes
33531.abstract: Many behavioral responses to climate change are carbon-intensive, raising concerns that adaptation may cause additional warming. The sign and magnitude of this feedback depend on how increased emissions from cooling balance against reduced emissions from heating across space and time. We present an empirical approach that forecasts the effect of future adaptive energy use on global average temperature over the 21st century. We find energy-based adaptation will lower global mean surface temperature in 2099 by 0.12 degrees Celsius (0.07 degrees Celsius) relative to baseline projections under RCP8.5 (RCP4.5) and avoid 1.8 (0.6) trillion USD ($\$2019$) in damages. Energy-based adaptation lowers business-as-usual emissions for 85% of countries, reducing the mitigation required to meet their unilateral Nationally Determined Contributions under the UNFCCC by 20% on average. These findings indicate that while business-as-usual adaptive energy use is unlikely to accelerate warming, it raises important implications for countries’ existing mitigation commitments.
33531.zh_abstract: 许多应对气候变化的行为是碳密集型的，这引发了适应行为可能导致额外变暖的担忧。这种反馈的符号和大小取决于因制冷而增加的排放与因供暖而减少的排放如何在空间和时间上达到平衡。我们提出了一种实证方法，预测未来适应性能源使用对21世纪全球平均温度的影响。我们发现，相对于RCP8.5（RCP4.5）下的基线预测，基于能源的适应将使2099年的全球平均地表温度降低0.12摄氏度（0.07摄氏度），并避免1.8（0.6）万亿美元（2019年美元）的损失。基于能源的适应降低了85%国家的常规排放，使这些国家为履行其在《联合国气候变化框架公约》下的单方面国家自主贡献所需的减排量平均减少20%。这些发现表明，虽然常规的适应性能源使用不太可能加速变暖，但它对各国现有的减排承诺产生了重要影响。

33530.title: Returns to Specific Graduate Degrees: Estimates Using Texas Administrative Records
33530.zh_title: 特定研究生学位的回报：基于德克萨斯州行政记录的估计
33530.abstract: We estimate causal effects of 121 graduate degrees on log earnings. The returns average 0.159 but vary widely across fields, with a standard deviation of 0.176. Experience profiles of the returns also vary and are particularly steep for medicine. Internal rates of return, which account for program length, tuition, and in-school earnings, are sizable but vary less across fields. Earnings effects are higher for women, lower for part time students, and depend on undergraduate major. Students from lower-paying undergraduate majors benefit more from an MBA or JD. School specific returns are higher for higher ranked JD and MBA programs.
33530.zh_abstract: 我们估计了121个研究生学位对对数收入的因果效应。平均回报率为0.159，但不同领域差异很大，标准差为0.176。回报的经验曲线也各不相同，医学领域的曲线尤为陡峭。内部收益率（考虑了项目时长、学费和在校期间收入）相当可观，但跨领域的差异较小。收入效应对于女性更高，对于非全日制学生更低，并且取决于本科专业。来自低收入本科专业的学生从MBA或法学博士学位中获益更多。对于排名更高的法学博士和MBA项目，学校特定的回报率也更高。

33523.title: Banks and the State-Dependent Effects of Monetary Policy
33523.zh_title: 银行与货币政策的非对称效应
33523.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Federico Puglisi, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
33523.abstract: This paper provides empirical evidence that contractionary monetary policy is less powerful in high interest-rate environments. We argue that this state dependence reflects the interaction between bank’s net interest margins (the return on banks’ assets minus the per-dollar cost of their funds), and households’ high marginal propensity to consume out of liquid wealth. We construct a banking model in which social dynamics shape household attentiveness to deposit rates and embed it in a nonlinear heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model. Estimated versions of the partial and general equilibrium models account well for the observed state dependence in the response of banks’ net interest margins and the response of aggregate economic activity to monetary policy shocks.
33523.zh_abstract: 本文提供了经验证据，表明紧缩性货币政策在高利率环境中的效力较弱。我们认为，这种状态依赖性反映了银行的净息差（银行资产回报率减去每美元资金成本）与家庭对流动财富的高边际消费倾向之间的相互作用。我们构建了一个银行模型，其中社会动态塑造了家庭对存款利率的关注程度，并将其嵌入一个非线性的异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型中。部分均衡和一般均衡模型的估计版本很好地解释了观察到的银行净息差响应以及总体经济活动对货币政策冲击响应的状态依赖性。

33522.title: On the Fragility of the Nonlinear Phillips Curve View of Recent Inflation
33522.zh_title: 论近期通胀的非线性菲利普斯曲线观点的脆弱性
33522.authors: Paul Beaudry, Chenyu Hou, Franck Portier
33522.abstract: The paper examines whether the US evidence in favour of a nonlinearity in the Phillips curve is robust or fragile. To this end, we use both cross city and aggregate time series data. We are particularly concerned with the possibility that the evidence in favour a nonlinear Phillips curve may is fact be driven by improperly controlling for inflation expectations. Our finding suggest that the evidence in support of a nonlinear Phillips curve is very fragile.
33522.zh_abstract: 本文考察了支持菲利普斯曲线存在非线性的美国证据是稳健的还是脆弱的。为此，我们同时使用了跨城市数据和总体时间序列数据。我们特别关注这样一种可能性，即支持非线性菲利普斯曲线的证据实际上可能是由对通胀预期的不当控制所驱动的。我们的研究结果表明，支持非线性菲利普斯曲线的证据非常脆弱。

33521.title: Reproductive Technology and the Child Care Sector: How Access to Oral Contraception and Abortion Shaped Workforce Composition and Quality
33521.zh_title: 生殖技术与儿童保育部门：口服避孕药和堕胎机会如何塑造劳动力构成与质量
33521.abstract: The composition and quality of the child care workforce may be uniquely sensitive to changes in the complementarities between home production and market work. This paper examines whether the expansion of oral contraceptives and abortion access throughout the 1960's and 1970's influenced the composition, quality, and wages of the child care workforce. Leveraging state-by-birth cohort variation in access to these reproductive technologies, we find that they significantly altered the educational profile of child care workers---increasing the proportion of less-educated women in the sector while reducing the share of highly-educated workers. This shift led to a decline in average education levels and wages within the child care workforce. Furthermore, access to the pill and abortion influenced child care employment differently across settings, with center-based providers losing more high-skilled workers to alternatives with better career opportunities, and home-based and private household providers absorbing more low-skilled women, for whom child care may have remained a viable employment destination. Overall, our findings indicate that increased reproductive autonomy, while expanding women's access to higher-skilled and -paying professions, also resulted in a redistribution of skilled labor away from child care, which may have implications for service quality, child development, and parental employment.
33521.zh_abstract: 儿童保育劳动力的构成和质量可能对家庭生产与市场工作之间互补性的变化特别敏感。本文考察了20世纪60年代和70年代口服避孕药和堕胎机会的扩大是否影响了儿童保育劳动力的构成、质量和工资。利用各州-出生队列在获得这些生殖技术方面的差异，我们发现这些技术显著改变了儿童保育工作者的教育背景——增加了该部门中受教育程度较低女性的比例，同时减少了高学历工作者的份额。这种转变导致儿童保育劳动力的平均教育水平和工资下降。此外，获得避孕药和堕胎的机会在不同环境下对儿童保育就业的影响不同：以中心为基础的保育机构因更好的职业机会而流失了更多高技能工人，而以家庭为基础和私人家庭的保育机构则吸收了更多低技能女性，对她们而言，儿童保育可能仍然是一个可行的就业目的地。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，生殖自主权的增强，在扩大女性进入高技能和高薪职业机会的同时，也导致了技能劳动力从儿童保育领域的重新分配，这可能对服务质量、儿童发展和父母就业产生影响。
33521.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I21, I38, J13, J22, J24

33520.title: Reassessing Qualitative Self-Assessments and Experimental Validation
33520.zh_title: 重新评估定性自我评估与实验验证
33520.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Pietro Ortoleva, Erik Snowberg, Leeat Yariv, Colin Camerer
33520.abstract: Qualitative self-assessments of economic preferences have recently gained popularity, often supported by experimental validation, a method that links them to choices in incentivized elicitations. We illustrate theoretically that experimental validation may fail to produce reliable new measures. Empirically, analyzing data from over 13,000 participants across diverse samples, we document four key findings. First, qualitative self-assessments and traditional incentivized measures exhibit weak correlations, even when accounting for response noise. Second, qualitative self-assessments sometimes correlate more strongly with theoretically distinct incentivized elicitations than those for which they are intended to proxy. Third, relationships between qualitative self-assessments and various attributes---including geographical location, demographics, and behaviors---are unrelated to variation in incentivized elicitations. Fourth, qualitative self-assessments are no simpler for participants than incentivized elicitations: these questions show a common heuristic of extreme or midpoint responses, especially by individuals with lower cognitive ability.
33520.zh_abstract: 经济偏好的定性自我评估最近变得流行，通常得到实验验证的支持，这种方法将其与激励性诱导中的选择联系起来。我们从理论上说明，实验验证可能无法产生可靠的新度量。在实证方面，通过分析来自不同样本的超过13,000名参与者的数据，我们记录了四个关键发现。第一，定性自我评估与传统的激励性度量之间表现出弱相关性，即使在考虑响应噪声后也是如此。第二，定性自我评估有时与理论上不同的激励性诱导的相关性，比与它们旨在代理的激励性诱导的相关性更强。第三，定性自我评估与各种属性（包括地理位置、人口统计特征和行为）之间的关系，与激励性诱导的变异无关。第四，定性自我评估对参与者来说并不比激励性诱导更简单：这些问题显示出一种常见的极端或中点响应启发式，尤其是在认知能力较低的个体中。
33520.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C90, C91, C93, D90

33515.title: A Comprehensive GIS Database for China's Surface Transport Network with Implications for Transport and Socioeconomics Research
33515.zh_title: 中国地面交通网络综合GIS数据库及其对交通与社会科学研究的启示
33515.authors: Steven J. Davis, Meijun Qian, Wen Zeng
33515.abstract: We build a granular GIS database that covers China’s national highways, modern motorways, traditional railways, high-speed railways, and waterways at an annual frequency from 1993 to 2020. Overall network length more than tripled after 1993, with half the increase accounted for by modern motorways and high-speed railways. Mean distance from zip-code centroids in China to nearest motorway access point fell from 302 km in 1993 to 15 km in 2020. Average within-county connectivity to the transport network rose sharply. We also show that discrepancies between distance to nearest motorway access point and straight-line distance to motorway routes are often large, and they correlate with calendar time, terrain features, and economic development. This finding raises concerns about the use of straight-line distance when estimating the causal effects of transport improvements. Our GIS database is freely available on an open-access basis, creating an empirical laboratory for new research in multiple directions.
33515.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个精细的GIS数据库，涵盖了1993年至2020年期间中国国道、现代高速公路、传统铁路、高速铁路和水路的年度数据。1993年后，网络总长度增长了两倍多，其中一半的增长来自现代高速公路和高速铁路。中国邮政编码质心到最近高速公路接入点的平均距离从1993年的302公里下降到2020年的15公里。县域内与交通网络的平均连通性急剧上升。我们还发现，到最近高速公路接入点的距离与到高速公路路线的直线距离之间的差异通常很大，并且这种差异与日历时间、地形特征和经济发展水平相关。这一发现对使用直线距离来估计交通改善的因果效应提出了质疑。我们的GIS数据库以开放获取的方式免费提供，为多个方向的新研究创建了一个实证实验室。
33515.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE；JEL：L92, N75, O18, R40

33514.title: Workplace Stratification and Racial Health Disparities
33514.zh_title: 工作场所分层与种族健康差异
33514.authors: Kurt J. Lavetti, Long Hong, Jonathan A. Holmes, Trevon D. Logan
33514.abstract: To what extent is a worker's relative rank within their workplace a determinant of health status, conditional on income? We provide the first US-based evidence on the relationship between relative workplace rank and health status for the near population of workers in one US state. Using a new linkage of commercial all-payer health insurance data to administrative earnings records for workers in Utah from 2013-2015, we quantify the impact of relative workplace rank on health status, the incidence of specific chronic diseases, and racial health disparities. We show that about 70% of SES-health gradient that is commonly interpreted as an income gradient actually operates through relative rank. For an average worker, moving from the 90th to the 10th percentile of within-firm rank holding fixed income, age, location, and health insurance characteristics is associated with a 16.5% increase in morbidity. The racial segregation of jobs in the US leads minority workers to be overrepresented in lower-ranked jobs within firms, which in turn exacerbates racial health disparities.
33514.zh_abstract: 在控制收入的情况下，工人在其工作场所内的相对排名在多大程度上是健康状况的决定因素？我们提供了首个基于美国数据的证据，研究美国一个州近乎全体工人的相对工作场所排名与健康状况之间的关系。利用2013-2015年犹他州工人的商业全付款人健康保险数据与行政收入记录的新链接，我们量化了相对工作场所排名对健康状况、特定慢性病发病率以及种族健康差异的影响。我们表明，通常被解释为收入梯度的社会经济地位-健康梯度中，约有70%实际上是通过相对排名起作用的。对于一个普通工人而言，在固定收入、年龄、地点和健康保险特征的情况下，从公司内部排名的第90百分位移动到第10百分位，与发病率增加16.5%相关。美国工作的种族隔离导致少数族裔工人在公司内较低级别的职位中占比过高，这反过来又加剧了种族健康差异。

33513.title: Place-Based Policies of the European Union: Contrasts and Similarities to the US Experience
33513.zh_title: 欧盟的场所导向政策：与美国经验的对比与相似之处
33513.authors: Peter R. Berkowitz, Michael Storper, Max Herbertson
33513.abstract: The European place-based policy framework was established in the European Treaties and has a current budget of $\$60$-70 billion per year. This paper identifies key features and directions for its future development with respect to three place-based problems: traditionally lagging regions; contemporary distressed (or left-behind regions), including those facing the structural challenges of the energy transition; the challenge of spreading prosperity faced with the uneven geography of technological clusters and routine technology-based manufacturing. We analyze the place-based features of EU Cohesion Policy, its commonalities and differences with place-based policies in the US. We evaluate policies against a structural backdrop of long-term convergence in the two continents and the contemporary geography of spatial divergence, using both historical perspectives and recent policy evaluation evidence. Key differences are identified in policy programming, implementation, budgeting and time horizons. While there has been evidence of the reduction of disparities and regional reconversion as a result of place-based policies on both continents, there are also serious impediments to effective implementation in both. These limits have to do with how well policy is designed with respect to economic geography fundamentals as well as political economy and organizational problems in policy design, implementation and governance. The paper concludes by drawing some general lessons on the design of place based policies and examines some of the issues that are particularly relevant for Europe.
33513.zh_abstract: 欧洲的场所导向政策框架建立在欧洲条约中，当前年度预算为600-700亿美元。本文针对三个场所导向问题，确定了其未来发展的关键特征和方向：传统落后地区；当代困境地区（或“被遗忘的地区”），包括那些面临能源转型结构性挑战的地区；面对技术集群和常规技术制造业地理分布不均的繁荣扩散挑战。我们分析了欧盟凝聚政策的场所导向特征，及其与美国场所导向政策的共性和差异。我们利用历史视角和近期政策评估证据，在两大洲长期趋同的结构性背景和当代空间分异的地理格局下评估政策。在政策规划、实施、预算编制和时间跨度方面发现了关键差异。虽然有证据表明，两大洲的场所导向政策都减少了差距并实现了区域转型，但两地在有效实施方面也存在严重障碍。这些限制与政策设计如何适应经济地理基本原理，以及政策设计、实施和治理中的政治经济学和组织问题有关。本文最后总结了场所导向政策设计的一些一般性经验教训，并考察了与欧洲特别相关的一些问题。

33559.title: Improving Childhood Immunization through Maternal Support: Evidence from a Randomized Intervention in Pakistan
33559.zh_title: 通过母亲支持改善儿童免疫接种：来自巴基斯坦一项随机干预的证据
33559.authors: Adeline L. Delavande, Areeba Shahab, Javed Younas, Basit Zafar
33559.abstract: We evaluate the effectiveness of randomized interventions aimed at alleviating psychological barriers (maternal stress and difficulty visualizing the future) and addressing information frictions on early childhood immunization uptake in a sample of 2,145 mothers of infants in Pakistan. A phone-delivered intervention providing psychological support and visualization techniques to mothers increases the total number of vaccines received by young children by 0.3, or 7% of the control mean, one year after baseline. The impacts are larger for lower-income households. We also find that the intervention improves maternal knowledge, attitudes, and perceived returns to vaccination, highlighting the role of psychological support in shaping health behaviors. However, supplementing this intervention with vaccination-related information from influencers does not yield additional benefits.
33559.zh_abstract: 我们评估了旨在缓解心理障碍（母亲压力和难以设想未来）以及解决信息摩擦的随机干预措施，对巴基斯坦2145名婴儿母亲样本中早期儿童免疫接种率的效果。一项通过电话提供的、为母亲提供心理支持和可视化技巧的干预措施，在基线调查一年后，使幼儿接种的疫苗总数增加了0.3剂，即对照组均值的7%。对低收入家庭的影响更大。我们还发现，该干预措施改善了母亲的知识、态度以及对疫苗接种回报的认知，突显了心理支持在塑造健康行为中的作用。然而，在干预措施中补充来自影响者的疫苗接种相关信息并未带来额外收益。

33558.title: Intergenerational Mobility of Immigrants in 15 Destination Countries
33558.zh_title: 15个目的地国家移民的代际流动性
33558.authors: Leah Boustan, Mathias Fjællegaard Jensen, Ran Abramitzky, Elisa Jácome, Alan Manning, Santiago Pérez, Analysia Watley, Adrian Adermon, Jaime Arellano-Bover, Olof Åslund, Marie Connolly, Nathan Deutscher, Anne C. Gielen, Yvonne Giesing, Yajna Govind, Martin Halla, Dominik Hangartner, Yuyan Jiang, Cecilia Karmel, Fanny Landaud, Lindsey Macmillan, Isabel Z. Martínez, Alberto Polo, Panu Poutvaara, Hillel Rapoport, Sara Roman, Kjell G. Salvanes, Shmuel San, Michael Siegenthaler, Louis Sirugue, Javier Soria Espín, Jan Stuhler, Giovanni L. Violante, Dinand Webbink, Andrea Weber, Jonathan Zhang, Angela Zheng, Tom Zohar
33558.abstract: We estimate intergenerational mobility of immigrants and their children in fifteen receiving countries. We document large income gaps for first-generation immigrants that diminish in the second generation. Around half of the second-generation gap can be explained by differences in parental income, with the remainder due to differential rates of absolute mobility. The daughters of immigrants enjoy higher absolute mobility than daughters of locals in most destinations, while immigrant sons primarily enjoy this advantage in countries with long histories of immigration. Cross-country differences in absolute mobility are not driven by parental country-of-origin, but instead by destination labor markets and immigration policy.
33558.zh_abstract: 我们估算了移民及其子女在十五个接收国的代际流动性。我们记录了第一代移民存在较大的收入差距，这一差距在第二代中有所缩小。大约一半的第二代差距可以由父母收入的差异来解释，其余部分则归因于绝对流动性的差异率。在大多数目的地，移民女儿比本地人女儿享有更高的绝对流动性，而移民儿子的这一优势主要存在于具有长期移民历史的国家。绝对流动性的跨国差异并非由父母的来源国驱动，而是由目的地劳动力市场和移民政策决定。

33557.title: The Value of Clean Water: Experimental Evidence from Rural India
33557.zh_title: 清洁用水的价值：来自印度农村的实验证据
33557.authors: Fiona Burlig, Amir Jina, Anant Sudarshan
33557.abstract: Over 2 billion people lack clean drinking water. Existing solutions face high costs (piped water) or low demand (point-of-use chlorine). Using a 60,000 household cluster-randomized experiment we test an increasingly popular alternative: decentralized treatment and home delivery of clean water to the rural poor. At low prices, take-up exceeds 90 percent, sustained throughout the experiment. High prices reduce take-up but are privately profitable. Self-reported health measures improve. We experimentally recover revealed-preference measures of valuation. Willingness-to-pay is several times higher than prior indirect estimates; willingness-to-accept is larger and exceeds marginal cost. On a cost-per-disability-adjusted-life-year basis, free water delivery regimes appear highly cost-effective.
33557.zh_abstract: 超过20亿人缺乏清洁饮用水。现有解决方案要么成本高昂（管道供水），要么需求低迷（家用氯消毒）。我们利用一个涉及60,000户家庭的整群随机实验，测试了一种日益流行的替代方案：分散式处理并将清洁水送到农村贫困家庭。在低价时，接受率超过90%，并在整个实验期间得以维持。高价降低了接受率，但私人盈利。自我报告的健康指标有所改善。我们通过实验获得了基于显示性偏好的估值度量。支付意愿比先前的间接估计高出数倍；接受意愿更高，且超过了边际成本。按每残疾调整生命年成本计算，免费送水制度似乎具有很高的成本效益。

33556.title: Are there too Few Publicly Listed Firms in the US?
33556.zh_title: 美国公开上市公司是否太少？
33556.authors: Craig Doidge, G. Andrew Karolyi, Kris Shen, René M. Stulz
33556.abstract: Doidge, Karolyi, and Stulz (2017) show that from 1999 to 2012 the US develops a listing gap relative to other countries, meaning that it has abnormally few publicly listed firms. In this paper, we update their evidence to 2023 and find that the listing gap increases, but at a low rate. By 2023, the US has about half as many listed firms per capita as other developed countries. We discuss some of the important questions raised by the existence and increase of the listing gap to which we hope researchers will find answers.
33556.zh_abstract: Doidge, Karolyi和Stulz (2017) 表明，从1999年到2012年，美国相对于其他国家出现了上市缺口，这意味着其公开上市公司数量异常少。在本文中，我们将他们的证据更新至2023年，发现上市缺口在扩大，但速度较低。到2023年，美国人均上市公司数量约为其他发达国家的一半。我们讨论了上市缺口的存在和扩大所引发的一些重要问题，希望研究者能找到答案。

33555.title: The Curious Surge of Productivity in U.S. Restaurants
33555.zh_title: 美国餐饮业生产率的神秘激增
33555.authors: Austan Goolsbee, Chad Syverson, Rebecca Goldgof, Joe Tatarka
33555.abstract: We document that, after remaining almost constant for almost 30 years, real labor productivity at U.S. restaurants surged over 15% during the COVID pandemic. This surge has persisted even as many conditions have returned to pre-pandemic levels. Using mobile phone data tracking visits and spending at more than 100,000 individual limited service restaurants across the country, we explore the potential sources of the surge. It cannot be explained by economies of scale, expanding market power, or a direct result of COVID-sourced demand fluctuations. The restaurants’ productivity growth rates are strongly correlated, however, with reductions in the amount of time their customers spend in the establishments, particularly with a rising share of customers spending 10 minutes or less. The frequency of such ‘take-out’ customers rose considerably during COVID, even at fast food restaurants, and never went back down. The magnitude of the restaurant-level relationship between productivity and customer dwell time, if applied to the aggregate decrease in dwell time, can explain almost all of the aggregate productivity increase in our sample.
33555.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，在保持了近30年几乎不变之后，美国餐饮业的实际劳动生产率在新冠疫情期间激增了超过15%。即使许多条件已恢复到疫情前水平，这一激增仍然持续。利用追踪全国超过10万家有限服务餐厅的访问量和消费额的手机数据，我们探讨了这一激增的潜在来源。它无法用规模经济、市场势力扩张或新冠疫情引发的需求波动的直接结果来解释。然而，餐厅的生产率增长率与其顾客在店内停留时间的减少密切相关，特别是停留时间在10分钟或以下的顾客比例上升。这类“外卖”顾客的频率在疫情期间大幅上升，即使在快餐店也是如此，并且再也没有回落。如果将餐厅层面生产率与顾客停留时间之间关系的幅度应用于总体停留时间的减少，几乎可以解释我们样本中全部的生产率增长。

33554.title: The Unintended Consequences of Rebalancing
33554.authors: Campbell R. Harvey, Michele G. Mazzoleni, Alessandro Melone
33554.abstract: Institutional investors engage in trillions of dollars of regular portfolio rebalancing, often based on calendar schedules or deviations from allocation targets. We document that such rebalancing has a market-wide impact and generates predictable price patterns. When stocks are overweight, funds sell stocks and buy bonds, leading to a decrease in equity returns of 17 basis points over the next day. Our results are robust to controls for momentum, reversals, and macroeconomic information. Importantly, we estimate that current rebalancing practices cost investors about $\$16$ billion annually – or $\$200$ per U.S. household. Moreover, the predictability of these trades enables certain market participants to profit by front-running the orders of large institutional funds. While rebalancing remains a fundamental tool for investors, our findings highlight the costs associated with prevailing strategies and emphasize the need for innovative approaches to mitigate these costs.
33554.zh_abstract: 机构投资者进行着数万亿美元的定期投资组合再平衡，通常基于日历时间表或偏离配置目标的情况。我们记录了这种再平衡具有市场范围的影响，并产生了可预测的价格模式。当股票超配时，基金会卖出股票并买入债券，导致次日股票收益率下降17个基点。我们的结果在控制了动量、反转和宏观经济信息后依然稳健。重要的是，我们估计当前的再平衡做法每年给投资者造成约160亿美元的损失——即每个美国家庭200美元。此外，这些交易的可预测性使得某些市场参与者能够通过抢先于大型机构基金的订单而获利。虽然再平衡仍然是投资者的基本工具，但我们的发现突显了现行策略相关的成本，并强调了需要创新方法来减轻这些成本。

33553.title: Labor, Loans and Leisure: The Impact of the Student Loan Payment Pause
33553.zh_title: 劳动、贷款与休闲：学生贷款还款暂停的影响
33553.abstract: Beginning in March 2020 and ultimately continuing to September 2023, most student loan borrowers had their required payments on federal student loans paused. For student loan borrowers with limited access to credit, the payment pause provided additional cash-on-hand that may have allowed them to reduce their work hours. Using survey data capturing individual finances, monthly work characteristics and educational attainment, we find that suspended student debt payments reduced average weekly hours worked by 1.34 (-4%) over a 10-month period with declines concentrated among workers who had not completed a college degree. For borrowers who had completed a college degree or graduate degree, there is no evidence that the payment pause changed employment or hours worked. These findings are consistent with consumer finance data showing that borrower households without a college degree are approximately twice as likely to report liquidity constraints relative to more educated households with federal student debt.
33553.zh_abstract: 从2020年3月开始，并最终持续到2023年9月，大多数学生贷款借款人的联邦学生贷款还款被暂停。对于信贷渠道有限的学生贷款借款人而言，还款暂停提供了额外的现金，这可能使他们能够减少工作时间。利用捕捉个人财务状况、月度工作特征和教育程度的调查数据，我们发现，暂停学生债务支付在10个月内使平均每周工作时间减少了1.34小时（-4%），这一下降主要集中在未完成大学学位的工人中。对于已完成大学学位或研究生学位的借款人，没有证据表明还款暂停改变了就业状况或工作时间。这些发现与消费者金融数据一致，该数据显示，与持有联邦学生债务且受教育程度更高的家庭相比，没有大学学位的借款人家庭报告流动性约束的可能性大约是其两倍。

33552.title: Skills, Migration and Urban Amenities over the Life Cycle
33552.zh_title: 生命周期中的技能、迁移与城市便利设施
33552.abstract: We examine sorting behavior across metropolitan areas by skill over individuals’ life cycles. We show that high-skill workers disproportionately sort into high-amenity areas, but do so relatively early in life. Workers of all skill levels tend to move towards lower-amenity areas during their thirties and forties. Consequently, individuals’ time use and expenditures on activities related to local amenities are U-shaped over the life cycle. This contrasts with well-documented life-cycle consumption profiles, which have an opposite inverted-U shape. We present evidence that the move towards lower-amenity (and lower-cost) metropolitan areas is driven by changes in the number of household children over the life cycle: individuals, particularly the college educated, tend to move towards lower-amenity areas after having their first child. We develop an equilibrium model of location choice, labor supply, and amenity consumption and introduce life-cycle changes in household composition that affect leisure preferences, consumption choices, and required home production time. Key to the model is a complementarity between leisure time spent going out and local amenities, which we estimate to be large and significant. Ignoring this complementarity and the distinction between types of leisure misses the dampening effect child rearing has on urban agglomeration. Since the value of local amenities is capitalized into housing prices, individuals will tend to move to lower-cost locations to avoid paying for amenities they are not consuming.
33552.zh_abstract: 我们研究了个人生命周期中按技能水平在大都市区域间的分类行为。我们表明，高技能工人不成比例地分类到高便利设施区域，但这是在生命相对早期进行的。所有技能水平的工人在三十多岁和四十多岁时都倾向于迁移到低便利设施区域。因此，个人在与当地便利设施相关的活动上的时间使用和支出在生命周期中呈U形。这与有据可查的生命周期消费曲线形成对比，后者呈相反的倒U形。我们提供的证据表明，向低便利设施（且低成本）大都市区域的迁移是由生命周期中家庭孩子数量的变化驱动的：个人，尤其是受过大学教育的人，在有了第一个孩子后倾向于迁移到低便利设施区域。我们开发了一个关于地点选择、劳动力供给和便利设施消费的均衡模型，并引入了家庭构成的周期性变化，这些变化影响休闲偏好、消费选择和所需的家庭生产时间。该模型的关键在于外出休闲时间与当地便利设施之间的互补性，我们估计这种互补性很大且显著。忽略这种互补性以及不同类型休闲之间的区别，就会忽略养育子女对城市集聚的抑制作用。由于当地便利设施的价值被资本化到房价中，个人倾向于迁移到低成本地点，以避免为他们没有消费的便利设施付费。

33551.title: Banking on Technology: Bank Technology Adoption and Its Effects
33551.zh_title: 押注技术：银行技术采纳及其影响
33551.authors: Sheila Jiang, Alessandro Rebucci, Gang Zhang
33551.abstract: We develop and estimate a new model of endogenous growth in bank efficiency and firm productivity in which banks adopt technology embedded in capital goods produced by entrepreneurs, and agents choose whether to become workers or capital-good-producing entrepreneurs. In this framework, bank efficiency influences firm productivity by affecting agents' occupational choices, while firm productivity affects bank efficiency through the relative price of capital goods. We find that increasing technology adoption in the banking system to the level in the top half of the distribution in the data accelerates the economy's long-term growth from 2% to 2.17%. We also find that empirical evidence based on U.S. bank, metropolitan, and state-level data is consistent with the critical mechanisms of our model.
33551.zh_abstract: 我们开发并估计了一个新的模型，该模型描述了银行效率和公司生产率的内生增长，其中银行采纳嵌入在企业家生产的资本品中的技术，并且代理人选择成为工人还是生产资本品的企业家。在这个框架中，银行效率通过影响代理人的职业选择来影响公司生产率，而公司生产率通过资本品的相对价格影响银行效率。我们发现，将银行系统的技术采纳水平提高到数据分布上半部分的水平，会使经济的长期增长率从2%加速到2.17%。我们还发现，基于美国银行、大都市和州级数据的经验证据与我们模型的关键机制是一致的。

33548.title: The Road Not Taken: How Driving Distance and Appointment Availability Shape the Effects of Abortion Bans
33548.zh_title: 未选择的路：驾驶距离与预约可用性如何塑造堕胎禁令的影响
33548.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Caitlin K. Myers, Mayra Pineda-Torres
33548.abstract: We use difference-in-differences research designs to estimate the effects of abortion bans on births at the county level, leveraging data on changes in driving distance to the nearest facility and appointment availability at facilities in the destination city. We find that the effects of abortion bans operate mainly through distance. In counties where the closest abortion facility was 50 miles away pre-Dobbs, a total ban is estimated to increase births by 0.8-1.0% if distance does not change, but by 2.1%-2.2% if distance rises to 300 miles—corresponding to the increase experienced by the average resident of a ban state. We also find that 6-week gestational age limits are nearly as impactful as total bans, underscoring the substantial burden these regulations impose. Limited appointment availability in destination cities modestly amplifies these effects. We do not observe evidence that the effects of bans on fertility have diminished over time, despite expansions in logistical, financial, and telehealth abortion support, underscoring the persistent role that geographic barriers play in abortion access.
33548.zh_abstract: 我们使用双重差分研究设计，利用前往最近设施驾驶距离的变化以及目的地城市设施预约可用性的数据，在县级层面估计堕胎禁令对生育率的影响。我们发现，堕胎禁令的影响主要通过距离发挥作用。在多布斯案判决前，在距离最近堕胎设施50英里的县，如果距离不变，全面禁令预计将使生育率增加0.8-1.0%；但如果距离增加到300英里——相当于禁令州居民平均经历的增加幅度——则生育率将增加2.1%-2.2%。我们还发现，6周胎龄限制几乎与全面禁令一样具有影响力，这凸显了这些规定所带来的沉重负担。目的地城市有限的预约可用性会适度放大这些影响。我们没有观察到禁令对生育率的影响随时间减弱的证据，尽管后勤、财务和远程医疗堕胎支持有所扩大，这凸显了地理障碍在堕胎可及性中持续发挥的作用。

33547.title: Competition and Consumer Discrimination
33547.authors: Maggie E.C. Jones, Trevon D. Logan, David Rosé, Lisa D. Cook
33547.abstract: This paper studies consumer discrimination while taking into consideration the role of competition between firms, providing one of the first large-scale comprehensive analyses of consumer discrimination and market forces. We formally model consumer discrimination, where some majority-group members dislike consuming alongside minorities. In equilibrium, the non-discriminatory-to-discriminatory firm ratio is proportional to the minority-to-majority consumer ratio. Empirically, we examine how local changes in the composition of consumers altered business incentives to discriminate during the decades leading up to the passage of the Civil Rights Act of 1964. Using a nationwide data source of non-discriminatory businesses in three different industries and a research design that leverages two sources of exogenous variation in the ratio of Black-to-White consumers, we find that increases in non-discrimination were concentrated in the least competitive markets, where the threat of defection by White consumers to competing firms was lowest. We assemble new data on over 25,000 prices charged at establishments by discriminatory status and show that non-discriminatory firms charged higher prices than discriminatory firms in the same local market. Consistent with our theoretical model, this finding arises because the effects of greater competition among the more numerous discriminatory firms outweighed the discrimination markup. The results imply that monopoly power blunted the influence of consumer preferences and that Black consumers were harmed through higher prices in the non-discriminatory market.
33547.zh_abstract: 本文在研究消费者歧视的同时，考虑了企业间竞争的作用，提供了首批大规模、全面的消费者歧视与市场力量分析之一。我们正式构建了消费者歧视模型，其中一些多数群体成员不喜欢与少数群体成员一起消费。在均衡状态下，非歧视性企业与歧视性企业的比例与少数群体消费者与多数群体消费者的比例成正比。在实证方面，我们考察了在1964年《民权法案》通过前的几十年里，消费者构成的局部变化如何改变了企业的歧视激励。利用涵盖三个不同行业的全国性非歧视性企业数据源，以及利用黑人与白人消费者比例的两个外生变异来源的研究设计，我们发现非歧视性的增加集中在竞争最不激烈的市场，在这些市场中，白人消费者叛逃到竞争对手企业的威胁最低。我们根据歧视状态收集了超过25,000个企业定价的新数据，并表明在同一本地市场中，非歧视性企业的定价高于歧视性企业。与我们的理论模型一致，这一发现的出现是因为数量更多的歧视性企业之间更激烈的竞争效应超过了歧视加价。结果表明，垄断力量削弱了消费者偏好的影响，并且黑人消费者因非歧视性市场中的更高价格而受到损害。

33546.title: Greenhouse Gases Resulting from Grid-Connected Electricity Demand: Three Pillars and Scope Two
33546.zh_title: 并网电力需求产生的温室气体：三大支柱与范围二
33546.abstract: Many governments and businesses would like to minimize or eliminate the greenhouse gases that result from their purchases of power from electricity grids. Because electricity flows cannot be traced from purchasers back to specific generators, some regulators and users have proposed an approximation. Purchasers would be credited with using clean power if they contract for electricity generated by particular zero-carbon suppliers to the grid or purchase certificates accompanying that zero-carbon generation, so long as those arrangements meet three conditions, or “pillars”: The associated clean power must be generated (1) nearby, (2) during the same hour, and (3) from newly constructed power plants. Whether or not the three pillars are followed, existing or planned electricity generation meeting all three conditions is expected to account for 10 percent of US power in 2030. We show that the qualifying power would be cleaner than average, but not zero-carbon. Electricity purchases meeting the restrictions will have incremental emissions per megawatt hour 30 to 43 percent below unrestricted average emissions per megawatt hour. The three pillars could have additional climate benefits if demand for clean power exceeds the restricted supply, resulting in less total electricity demand or encouraging construction of new clean electricity capacity.
33546.zh_abstract: 许多政府和企业希望最小化或消除其从电网购电所产生的温室气体。由于电力流无法从购买者追溯到特定发电商，一些监管机构和用户提出了一种近似方法。如果购买者与向电网供电的特定零碳发电商签订合同，或购买伴随该零碳发电的证书，并且这些安排满足三个条件或“支柱”，则购买者将被视为使用了清洁电力。这三个条件是：相关的清洁电力必须（1）在附近，（2）在同一小时内，以及（3）由新建的发电厂产生。无论是否遵循三大支柱，满足所有三个条件的现有或计划中的发电量预计将在2030年占美国电力的10%。我们表明，符合条件的电力将比平均水平更清洁，但并非零碳。满足这些限制条件的电力购买，其每兆瓦时的增量排放量将比不受限制的平均每兆瓦时排放量低30%至43%。如果对清洁电力的需求超过受限供应，导致总电力需求减少或鼓励新建清洁电力产能，那么三大支柱可能会带来额外的气候效益。

33545.title: Financing the Adoption of Clean Technology
33545.zh_title: 为清洁技术采用提供融资
33545.abstract: We analyze the adoption of clean technology by heterogeneous firms subject to financing constraints. In the model, capital goods differ in terms of their energy needs and age. In equilibrium, cleaner and newer capital requires more financial resources. Therefore, financial constraints induce an endogenous pattern in clean technology adoption: Financially constrained, smaller firms optimally invest in dirtier and older capital than unconstrained, larger firms. The model is consistent with the empirical patterns of technology adoption we document using data on commercial shipping fleets. We use a calibrated version of our model to simulate the aggregate transition dynamics to cleaner technology.
33545.zh_abstract: 我们分析了面临融资约束的异质性企业对清洁技术的采用。在模型中，资本品在能源需求和年限方面存在差异。在均衡状态下，更清洁、更新的资本需要更多的金融资源。因此，金融约束在清洁技术采用中引发了一种内生模式：与不受约束的大型企业相比，受金融约束的小型企业最优地投资于更脏、更旧的资本。该模型与我们使用商业船队数据记录的关于技术采用的经验模式一致。我们使用模型的校准版本模拟向清洁技术过渡的总体动态。

33544.title: Equity Prices, Market Power, and Optimal Corporate Tax Policy
33544.zh_title: 股票价格、市场势力与最优公司税政策
33544.authors: Ignacio González, Juan A. Montecino, Joseph E. Stiglitz
33544.abstract: We study the optimal design of corporate tax policy in a textbook life-cycle model featuring two key deviations: (i) firms are imperfectly competitive and (ii) households save by purchasing equity shares in a stock market. In this simple environment, the financial wealth of savers is equal to the sum of the productive capital owned by firms and a component capturing the NPV of unproductive rents – what we term “market power wealth” (MPW). We show that this novel component has non-trivial macroeconomic effects, with important implications for optimal corporate tax policy. In particular, MPW significantly crowds out productive investment and accordingly can rationalize a high corporate tax rate. The optimal corporate tax code in our setting assigns the statutory corporate tax rate to target the financial value of pure profits while incentivizing capital accumulation with a partial expensing of firm investment costs.
33544.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个教科书式的生命周期模型中公司税政策的最优设计，该模型包含两个关键偏离：(i) 企业是不完全竞争的，(ii) 家庭通过购买股票市场上的股权份额进行储蓄。在这个简单的环境中，储蓄者的金融财富等于企业拥有的生产性资本与一个捕捉非生产性租金净现值的组成部分之和——我们称之为“市场势力财富”（MPW）。我们表明，这个新的组成部分具有非平凡的宏观经济效应，对最优公司税政策有重要影响。特别是，MPW显著挤出了生产性投资，因此可以合理化高公司税率。在我们的设定中，最优公司税法典将法定公司税率用于瞄准纯利润的金融价值，同时通过部分费用化企业投资成本来激励资本积累。

33543.title: From Access to Achievement: The Primary School-Age Impacts of an At-Scale Preschool Construction Program in Highly Deprived Communities
33543.zh_title: 从入学到成就：一项大规模幼儿园建设项目在高度贫困社区对小学年龄阶段的影响
33543.authors: Marina Bassi, Bruno Besbas, Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Saravana Ravindran, Ana Reynoso
33543.abstract: Using a randomized control trial, this paper studies an at-scale preschool construction program that serves poor communities in rural Mozambique. We show that the program significantly increased preschool enrollment in treated communities by 73 percentage points, from a small base of 2 percent of children enrolled in preschool in control communities. The program also had significant positive effects on enrollment in and progression through primary school, with an increase of 6 percentage points in enrollment in first grade at age 6, and a 0.16 standard deviation impact on an index of cognitive and social-emotional skills measured at primary school-age. The impacts are concentrated among children of less educated parents, in less poor households, and living closer to the preschools. We also find that enrollment in preschool is an important direct mechanism for primary school success. Finally, the program caused parents in treated communities to invest more time in supporting their primary school-aged children and increased preschool enrollment of younger siblings. Our paper shows that even in a context of extreme vulnerability, a preschool construction program can be implemented in a cost-effective way and significantly improve child development for the founding and future generations.
33543.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项随机对照试验，研究了一个服务于莫桑比克农村贫困社区的大规模幼儿园建设项目。我们表明，该计划使受干预社区的幼儿园入学率显著提高了73个百分点，而对照组社区中仅有2%的儿童入学。该计划还对小学入学和升学产生了显著的积极影响，使6岁儿童一年级入学率提高了6个百分点，并对小学年龄阶段测量的认知和社交情感技能指数产生了0.16个标准差的影响。这些影响集中在父母受教育程度较低、家庭贫困程度较轻以及居住地离幼儿园较近的儿童中。我们还发现，幼儿园入学是小学成功的一个重要直接机制。最后，该计划促使受干预社区的父母投入更多时间支持他们上小学的孩子，并增加了弟弟妹妹的幼儿园入学率。我们的论文表明，即使在极端脆弱的背景下，幼儿园建设项目也可以以成本效益高的方式实施，并显著改善创始一代和未来几代人的儿童发展。

33542.title: Malthusian Migrations
33542.abstract: For most of human history, until the fertility transition, technological progress translated into larger populations, preventing sustained improvements in living standards. We argue that migration offered an escape valve from these Malthusian dynamics after the European discovery and colonization of the Americas. We document a strong relationship between fertility and migration across countries, regions, individuals, and periods, in a variety of datasets and specifications, and with different identification strategies. During the Age of Mass Migration, persistently high fertility across much of Europe created a large reservoir of surplus labor that could find better opportunities in the New World. These migrations, by relieving demographic pressures, accelerated the transition to modern growth.
33542.zh_abstract: 在人类历史的大部分时间里，直到生育率转型之前，技术进步转化为更多的人口，阻碍了生活水平的持续提高。我们认为，在欧洲发现并殖民美洲之后，移民为摆脱这些马尔萨斯动态提供了一个出口。我们利用多种数据集、不同设定和识别策略，在国家、地区、个人和时期层面，记录了生育率与移民之间的强相关关系。在大规模移民时代，欧洲大部分地区持续的高生育率创造了一个庞大的剩余劳动力蓄水池，这些人可以在新大陆找到更好的机会。这些移民通过缓解人口压力，加速了向现代增长的转型。
33542.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, POL；JEL：F22, J13, N33, O11

33541.title: ‘Invest!’: Liberty Bonds and Stock Ownership over the Twentieth Century
33541.zh_title: “投资！”：自由债券与二十世纪的股票所有权
33541.authors: Gillian Brunet, Eric Hilt, Matthew S. Jaremski
33541.abstract: The Liberty Bond drives of World War I were nation-wide interventions aimed at increasing financial literacy and associating bond ownership with patriotism. Using data from the first year of the Survey of Consumer Finances, 1947, through 1971, we investigate whether exposure to the drives shaped investing behavior over the long run. We find that households residing in counties that had high Liberty Bond participation had greater stock and bond ownership rates in later decades, and held more favorable opinions towards retirement saving and stock investment. These effects are present only among cohorts actually exposed to the bond drives, and not among younger cohorts in the same counties, and are robust to an instrumental variables specification that takes advantage of differences in the way the bond drives were conducted. Our estimates imply that household stock ownership rates would have been about 20% lower in the late 1960s if the bond drives had not been conducted.
33541.zh_abstract: 第一次世界大战的自由债券运动是全国性的干预措施，旨在提高金融素养并将债券所有权与爱国主义联系起来。利用1947年至1971年消费者金融调查第一年的数据，我们研究了接触这些运动是否长期塑造了投资行为。我们发现，在自由债券参与率高的县，其居民在随后几十年中拥有股票和债券的比例更高，并且对退休储蓄和股票投资持有更积极的看法。这些影响仅存在于实际接触过债券运动的群体中，而不存在于同一县内的较年轻群体中，并且对于利用债券运动实施方式差异的工具变量设定是稳健的。我们的估计表明，如果没有进行债券运动，20世纪60年代末的家庭股票持有率将低约20%。

33540.title: A Model of Global Currency Pricing
33540.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Rui Lu, Kang Shi, Juanyi (Jenny) Xu
33540.abstract: This paper proposes a concept of a global currency and introduces a “global currency pricing” (GCP) specification into a standard N-country open economy macroeconomic model. A global currency is defined as a virtual unit of account that is exclusively used for international trade invoicing and is formed as a basket of individual currencies, similar to the existing SDR. We describe the pattern of exchange rate pass-through and real allocations under a global currency and derive optimal monetary policies under each specification. We show there is a unique welfare optimal composition of a global currency that weights currencies according to their importance in international trade. A striking implication is that under this global currency design, the monetary policy of each country should be concerned solely with domestic shocks. No country should have more than a 50 percent weight in an optimal global currency. The optimal configuration of the global currency applies whether or not there is international policy cooperation. Applying the model to a sample of 20 world countries and currencies, we find that all countries can gain in welfare from a shift out of dollar currency pricing (DCP) to GCP.
33540.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个全球货币的概念，并将“全球货币定价”（GCP）设定引入标准的N国开放经济宏观经济模型。全球货币被定义为一种虚拟的记账单位，专门用于国际贸易计价，并由一篮子单一货币组成，类似于现有的特别提款权（SDR）。我们描述了全球货币下汇率传递和实际分配的模式，并推导出每种设定下的最优货币政策。我们表明，存在一个独特的福利最优的全球货币构成，该构成根据各国货币在国际贸易中的重要性进行加权。一个引人注目的含义是，在这种全球货币设计下，每个国家的货币政策应仅关注国内冲击。在最优全球货币中，任何国家的权重都不应超过50%。无论是否存在国际政策合作，全球货币的最优配置都适用。将该模型应用于20个世界国家和货币的样本，我们发现所有国家都可以从从美元定价（DCP）转向全球货币定价（GCP）中获得福利收益。

33539.title: On the Economic Infeasibility of Personalized Medicine, and a Solution.
33539.zh_title: 论个性化医疗的经济不可行性及解决方案
33539.authors: Marina Chiara Garassino, Kunle Odunsi, Marciano Siniscalchi, Pietro Veronesi
33539.abstract: Technological advances and genomic sequencing opened the road to personalized medicine: specialized therapies targeted to patients displaying specific molecular alterations. For instance, targeted therapies are now available for 50% of lung cancer patients—with some alterations affecting less than 1% of patients—greatly increasing life expectancy. In an investment model of drug development, we show that current institutions mandating experimentation and approval of individual therapies eventually disincentivize investments in personalized medicine as researchers identify increasingly rare alterations. Recent AI-based technologies, such as AlphaFold3, make personalized medicine viable when regulatory approval regards the process for drug discovery rather than individual therapies.
33539.zh_abstract: 技术进步和基因组测序为个性化医疗开辟了道路：针对表现出特定分子改变的患者进行专门治疗。例如，目前50%的肺癌患者可获得靶向治疗——其中一些改变影响不到1%的患者——这大大延长了预期寿命。在一个药物开发的投资模型中，我们表明，当前要求对个体疗法进行实验和批准的机构，随着研究人员识别出越来越罕见的改变，最终会抑制对个性化医疗的投资。最近的基于人工智能的技术，如AlphaFold3，当监管批准针对的是药物发现过程而非个体疗法时，使得个性化医疗变得可行。
33539.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EH, PR；JEL：I11, I18, O32, O38

33538.title: Same As it Ever Was: Gender, Race, and Ethnicity Differences in Promotion for Academic Economists
33538.zh_title: 一如既往：学术经济学家的晋升中的性别、种族与民族差异
33538.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Shulamit Kahn, Daria Milakhina
33538.abstract: Using data from Academic Analytics 2009-2022 linked to publications and multiple approaches of identifying race, we examine gender and racial/ethnicity differentials in promotion of economists in economics and non-economics departments. Results are mixed. The share of Black economists remains at 3%. Huge gender penalties in promotion to both associate and full not explained by productivity continue in economics departments. There are no gender penalties in promotion to associate for economists in non-economics departments, although some in promotion to full. There are hardly any significant racial penalties in promotion to either rank, although statistical significance is difficult with such small samples.
33538.zh_abstract: 利用2009-2022年学术分析数据，结合出版物和多种识别种族的方法，我们研究了经济学系和非经济学系中经济学家在晋升方面的性别和种族/民族差异。结果好坏参半。黑人经济学家的比例保持在3%。在经济学系中，晋升为副教授和正教授方面存在巨大的、无法由生产力解释的性别惩罚。在非经济学系中，经济学家晋升为副教授没有性别惩罚，但在晋升为正教授方面存在一些惩罚。在晋升至任一职称方面，几乎不存在显著的种族惩罚，尽管由于样本量如此之小，统计显著性难以实现。

33537.title: An Evaluation of the Alief Independent School District Jumpstart Program: Using a Model to Recover Mechanisms from an RCT
33537.zh_title: 对Alief独立学区Jumpstart项目的评估：使用模型从随机对照试验中恢复机制
33537.authors: Flavio Cunha, Qinyou Hu, Andrea Salvati, Kenneth Wolpin, Rui Zeng
33537.abstract: This paper evaluates the Jumpstart Program (JSP), a parenting intervention implemented by a school district in the Houston area to enhance school readiness among economically disadvantaged three-year-old children. Unlike many early childhood programs typically tested in controlled research settings, JSP leverages existing school district resources for scalability and practical application. We conducted a three-year randomized controlled trial to measure the program’s impact on child cognitive outcomes, parental engagement, and mechanisms of change. The results indicate improvements in children’s performance on curriculum-aligned assessments and modest gains in general cognitive readiness as measured by the Bracken School Readiness Assessment. Furthermore, treatment group parents demonstrated increased reading frequency with their children, underscoring enhanced parental involvement as a crucial mechanism behind the program’s success. We employed a structural model to analyze both the direct effects of JSP and its indirect effects through changes in the marginal productivity of investments or preferences via habit formation. Our analysis concludes that 75% of the program’s impact is attributed to direct effects, while 25% is mediated through changes in habit formation in parental investments. Our research underscores the potential of scalable, real-world interventions to bridge socio-economic gaps in early childhood development and inform the design of effective educational policies.
33537.zh_abstract: 本文评估了Jumpstart项目（JSP），这是由休斯顿地区一个学区实施的旨在提高经济弱势三岁儿童入学准备程度的育儿干预措施。与许多通常在受控研究环境中测试的早期儿童项目不同，JSP利用现有学区资源以实现可扩展性和实际应用。我们进行了一项为期三年的随机对照试验，以衡量该项目对儿童认知结果、家长参与度以及变化机制的影响。结果表明，儿童在与课程一致的评估中的表现有所改善，并且通过Bracken入学准备评估衡量的通用认知准备度有适度提高。此外，干预组家长与孩子一起阅读的频率增加，这突显了增强的家长参与是该项目成功背后的关键机制。我们采用了一个结构模型来分析JSP的直接效应以及通过习惯养成改变投资边际生产力或偏好的间接效应。我们的分析得出结论，项目影响的75%归因于直接效应，而25%是通过家长投资习惯养成的变化来中介的。我们的研究强调了可扩展的、现实世界的干预措施在弥合早期儿童发展中的社会经济差距以及为有效教育政策设计提供信息方面的潜力。

33584.title: The Short-Run Effects of Congestion Pricing in New York City
33584.zh_title: 纽约市拥堵收费的短期效应
33584.authors: Cody Cook, Aboudy Kreidieh, Shoshana Vasserman, Hunt Allcott, Neha Arora, Freek van Sambeek, Andrew Tomkins, Eray Turkel
33584.abstract: We study the impacts of New York City’s Central Business District (CBD) Tolling Program, the first cordon-based congestion pricing scheme in the United States. Using a generalized synthetic controls design, we find that the policy increased speeds on CBD roads by 11%, with little-to-no effect on air quality, transactions at shops and restaurants, or overall foot traffic in the CBD. Speeds also increased on roads outside the CBD that are commonly traversed by drivers headed to/from the CBD. These spillovers lead to faster trips throughout the metro area, including for many unpriced trips. We develop a simple model to bound the driver welfare effects, and estimate gains of at least $\$14.3$ million/week (before any revenue recycling). These gains are largely driven by diffuse time savings for the many unpriced trips outside the CBD, highlighting the importance of accounting for network-wide spillovers. Finally, we show how characteristics of local travel patterns and road networks can inform the potential impacts of introducing cordon-based congestion pricing in other cities.
33584.zh_abstract: 我们研究了纽约市中央商务区（CBD）收费计划的影响，这是美国首个基于环线的拥堵收费方案。采用广义合成控制设计，我们发现该政策使CBD道路的车速提高了11%，但对空气质量、商店和餐厅的交易量或CBD的整体人流量几乎没有影响。在CBD之外、司机往返CBD常经过的道路上，车速也有所提高。这些溢出效应使得整个都市区的出行时间缩短，包括许多未收费的行程。我们开发了一个简单模型来界定司机福利效应，并估计出每周至少1430万美元的收益（在任何收入循环利用之前）。这些收益主要来自CBD之外许多未收费行程的广泛时间节省，凸显了考虑全网络溢出效应的重要性。最后，我们展示了当地出行模式和道路网络的特征如何为在其他城市引入基于环线的拥堵收费的潜在影响提供信息。

33583.title: The Rise of Healthcare Jobs
33583.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb, Neale Mahoney, Kevin Rinz, Victoria Udalova
33583.abstract: Healthcare employment has grown more than twice as fast as the labor force since 1980, overtaking retail trade to become the largest industry by employment in 2009. We document key facts about the rise of healthcare jobs. Earnings for healthcare workers have risen nearly twice as fast as those in other industries, with relatively large increases in the middle and upper-middle parts of the earnings distribution. Healthcare workers have remained predominantly female, with increases in the share of female doctors offsetting increases in the shares of male nurses and aides. Despite a few high-profile examples to the contrary, regions experiencing manufacturing job losses have not systematically reinvented themselves by pivoting from ``manufacturing to meds.''
33583.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，医疗保健行业的就业增长速度是劳动力增长速度的两倍多，并于2009年超过零售业，成为就业人数最多的行业。我们记录了医疗保健岗位崛起的几个关键事实。医疗保健工作者的收入增长速度几乎是其他行业的两倍，收入分配的中部和中部偏上部分增长相对较大。医疗保健工作者仍然以女性为主，女性医生比例的增加抵消了男性护士和护理员比例的增加。尽管存在少数引人注目的反例，但经历制造业岗位流失的地区并未通过从“制造业转向医药业”而系统地实现自我转型。
33583.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I11, J21, J31, J44

33582.title: The New Geography of Labor Markets
33582.zh_title: 劳动力市场的新地理格局
33582.authors: Mert Akan, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Thomas Bowen, Shelby R. Buckman, Steven J. Davis, Hyoseul Kim
33582.abstract: We study where Americans live in relation to their employer’s worksite using matched employer-employee data, and how that relationship changes with the rise of work from home (WFH). Mean distance from home to employer’s worksite rose more than 70% between 2019 and 2024 in our dataset. Twelve percent of employees hired after March 2020 reside fifty or more miles from their employer by 2024, triple the pre-pandemic share. Distance to employer rose most for those in their 30s and 40s, among highly paid employees, and in Finance, Information, and Professional Services. Especially for the affluent, the pandemic-instigated rise in WFH initiated a multi-year pattern of net migration to areas with cheaper housing and states with lower tax rates. Finally, we show that distant employees exhibit more sensitivity to firm-level adjustments on hiring and separation margins. These developments have implications for residential location, state-level tax revenues, labor markets, and household welfare.
33582.zh_abstract: 我们利用匹配的雇主-雇员数据研究美国人居住地与其雇主工作地点之间的关系，以及这种关系如何随着居家办公（WFH）的兴起而变化。在我们的数据集中，从家到雇主工作地点的平均距离在2019年至2024年间增长了超过70%。2020年3月之后入职的员工中，有12%到2024年时居住在距离雇主50英里或更远的地方，是疫情前比例的三倍。与雇主距离的增加在30多岁和40多岁的人群、高薪员工以及金融、信息和专业服务行业中最为显著。对于富裕人群而言，疫情引发的WFH兴起开启了一个多年期的净迁移模式，即迁往住房更便宜、税率更低的州。最后，我们表明，远程员工对公司在招聘和解雇方面的调整表现出更高的敏感性。这些发展对居住地选择、州级税收收入、劳动力市场和家庭福利都有影响。
33582.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：J20

33581.title: Why Are Nordic Workers so Remote?: Potential Causes and (Some) Indirect Labor Market Consequences
33581.zh_title: 为什么北欧员工如此倾向于远程办公？潜在原因及（部分）间接劳动力市场后果
33581.authors: Adam Gill, Lena E. Hensvik, Oskar Nordström Skans
33581.abstract: In this article, we show that working from home is much more prevalent in the Nordic countries than in the rest of Europe and we discuss potential causes and labor market consequences of this stylized fact. Likely contributing causes include a good technological infrastructure and comparatively widespread digital preparedness in the population. Recent research also suggests that trust is a crucial prerequisite for maintaining a spatial separation between supervisors and workers in marginal occupations. We show that survey measures of trust are extremely high in all Nordic countries, and that these measures correlate very strongly with work-from-home across countries and industries in Europe even controlling for a range of cross-country differences. Finally, we discuss potential spillover effects of increased hybrid work on the Nordic labor markets. We show evidence suggesting that increased hybrid work has caused a relocation of the production of local service firms from business centers to high-work-from-home residential areas, without affecting average commuting distances of service workers.
33581.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们表明居家办公在北欧国家比在欧洲其他地区更为普遍，并讨论了这一典型事实的潜在原因和劳动力市场后果。可能的促成因素包括良好的技术基础设施和人口中相对广泛的数字准备度。近期研究还表明，信任是维持边缘职业中监管者与员工之间空间分离的关键前提。我们表明，所有北欧国家的信任度调查指标都非常高，并且这些指标与欧洲各国和各行业的居家办公率存在非常强的相关性，即使在控制了一系列跨国差异后也是如此。最后，我们讨论了混合办公增加对北欧劳动力市场的潜在溢出效应。我们提供的证据表明，混合办公的增加已导致本地服务企业的生产从商业中心向高居家办公率的住宅区转移，但这并未影响服务工人的平均通勤距离。

33580.title: The Origins and Evolution of Occupational Licensing in the United States
33580.zh_title: 美国职业许可的起源与演变
33580.authors: Nicholas A. Carollo, Jason F. Hicks, Andrew Karch, Morris M. Kleiner
33580.abstract: The analysis of occupational licensing has concentrated largely on its labor market and consumer welfare effects. By contrast, relatively little is known about how occupational licensing laws originated or the key factors in their evolution. In this paper, we study the determinants of U.S. licensing requirements from 1870 to 2020. We begin by developing a model where licensing arises as an endogenous political outcome and use this framework to study how market characteristics and political incentives influence regulators’ choices. Our empirical analysis draws on a novel database tracking the initial enactment of licensing legislation for hundreds of unique occupations, as well as changes to the specific qualifications required to obtain a subset of licenses over time. We first show that, consistent with the predictions of our model, licensing requirements are more common and were adopted earlier for occupations whose tasks plausibly pose some risk to consumers. Second, large, urbanized states are significantly more likely to produce new policies. Third, among occupations regulated before 1940, licensing requirements appeared earlier in states with more practitioners and where incumbent workers likely experienced greater labor market competition. After 1980, state-level factors are more strongly associated with the timing of policy adoption. Finally, political organization, as measured by the establishment of a state professional association, significantly increases the probability of regulation. Together, our findings suggest that both public and private interests have contributed to the diffusion of licensing requirements across states and occupations.
33580.zh_abstract: 对职业许可的分析主要集中在劳动力市场和消费者福利效应上。相比之下，关于职业许可法律如何起源或其演变的关键因素，我们所知相对较少。在本文中，我们研究了1870年至2020年美国许可要求的决定因素。我们首先构建了一个模型，其中许可是作为内生政治结果出现的，并利用这一框架研究市场特征和政治激励如何影响监管者的选择。我们的实证分析基于一个新颖的数据库，该数据库追踪了数百种独特职业的许可立法初始颁布情况，以及随时间推移对获取部分特定许可证所需资格条件的变更。我们首先表明，与模型预测一致，对于那些任务可能对消费者构成风险的职业，许可要求更为普遍且被更早采用。其次，大型、城市化程度高的州更有可能制定新政策。第三，在1940年之前受到监管的职业中，许可要求出现在从业者更多、且在职工人可能面临更大劳动力市场竞争的州更早。1980年之后，州级因素与政策采纳时间的关联性更强。最后，以州级专业协会的成立为衡量标准的政治组织，显著提高了监管的可能性。我们的发现共同表明，公共利益和私人利益都促进了许可要求在各州和各职业间的扩散。

33579.title: Recombinant Innovation, Novel Ideas, and the Start of Nobel Prize-Winning Work
33579.zh_title: 重组式创新、新颖思想与诺贝尔奖获奖工作的开端
33579.authors: John Ham, Brian Quistorff, Bruce A. Weinberg
33579.abstract: We draw on a recombinant view of innovation, where being in a new location and/or multiple locations leads to exposure to novel combinations of ideas that increase the creativity of top scientists.
