Using a rich, unique dataset we helped assemble, we estimate the empirical relationship between being in a new location and/or multiple locations and the expected interval before an eventual Nobel laureate (ENL) commences their prize-winning work. We find that being in a new location and in multiple locations are substantially and significantly associated with a shorter expected interval before ENLs commence their prize-winning work.
33579.zh_abstract: 我们借鉴了创新的重组观点，即身处新地点和/或多个地点，会使顶尖科学家接触到新颖的思想组合，从而增强其创造力。利用我们协助构建的一个丰富且独特的数据集，我们估计了身处新地点和/或多个地点与未来诺贝尔奖得主（ENL）开始其获奖工作之前的预期间隔之间的实证关系。我们发现，身处新地点和身处多个地点，都与ENL开始其获奖工作之前的预期间隔显著缩短密切相关。

33578.title: Rules versus Discretion in Capital Regulation
33578.zh_title: 资本监管中的规则与自由裁量权
33578.abstract: We study capital regulation in a dynamic model for bank deposits. Capital regulation addresses banks’ incentive for excessive leverage that dilutes depositors, but preserves some dilution to reduce bank defaults. We show theoretically that capital regulation is subject to a time inconsistency problem. In a model with non-maturing deposits where optimal withdrawals make deposits endogenously long-term, we find commitment to have important effects on the optimal level and cyclicality of capital adequacy. Our results call for a systematic framework that limits capital regulators’ discretion.
33578.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个银行活期存款动态模型中的资本监管。资本监管旨在解决银行过度杠杆化（这会稀释存款人利益）的激励问题，但同时保留一定程度的稀释以减少银行违约。我们从理论上证明，资本监管存在时间不一致性问题。在一个具有非到期存款的模型中，最优取款行为使存款内生地具有长期性，我们发现承诺机制对最优资本充足水平及其周期性具有重要影响。我们的研究结果呼吁建立一个限制资本监管者自由裁量权的系统性框架。

33577.title: Should Friday be the New Saturday? Hours Worked and Hours Wanted
33577.zh_title: 周五应该成为新的周六吗？工作时长与期望工作时长
33577.authors: Gregor Jarosch, Laura Pilossoph, Anthony Swaminathan
33577.abstract: This paper investigates self-reported wedges between how much people work and how much they want to work, at their current wage. More than two-thirds of full-time workers in German survey data are overworked—usual hours exceed desired hours. We combine this evidence with a simple model of labor supply to assess the welfare consequences of tighter weekly hours limits via willingness-to-pay calculations. According to counterfactuals, the optimal length of the workweek in Germany is 37 hours. Introducing such a cap would raise welfare by 0.6-1.2% of GDP. The gains from a shortened workweek are largest for workers who are married, female, college-educated, white-collar, middle aged, and high income. An extended analysis integrates a non-constant wage-hours relationship, falling capital returns, and a shrinking tax base.
33577.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在现行工资水平下，人们自我报告的实际工作时长与期望工作时长之间的差距。根据德国调查数据，超过三分之二的全职工作者存在过度劳动——通常工作时长超过了期望时长。我们将这一证据与一个简单的劳动力供给模型相结合，通过意愿支付计算来评估更严格的每周工时上限的福利后果。根据反事实分析，德国最佳每周工作长度为37小时。引入这样一个上限将使福利提高GDP的0.6%-1.2%。缩短工作周的收益对于已婚、女性、大学学历、白领、中年和高收入的工作者最大。一项扩展分析整合了非恒定的工资-工时关系、下降的资本回报以及缩小的税基。

33576.title: Supply Constraints do not Explain House Price and Quantity Growth Across U.S. Cities
33576.zh_title: 供给约束无法解释美国各城市的房价与数量增长
33576.authors: Schuyler Louie, John A. Mondragon, Johannes Wieland
33576.abstract: The standard view of housing markets holds that differences in the flexibility of local housing supply—shaped by factors like geography and regulation—explain differences in how house price and quantity growth respond to rising demand across U.S. cities. However, from 2000 to 2020, we find that higher income growth predicts the same growth in house prices, housing quantity, and population regardless of a city’s estimated housing supply elasticity. We find the same results when we examine rents, expand the sample to 1980 to 2020, use different elasticity measures, use per capita income or population growth instead of total income growth, and when exploiting a variety of plausibly exogenous variation in local housing demand. Using a general demand-and-supply framework, we show that these results imply that estimated housing supply constraints are unimportant in explaining differences in rising house prices among U.S. cities. Our conclusions challenge the prevailing view of local housing and labor markets and suggest that relaxing regulatory housing supply constraints may not materially affect housing affordability.
33576.zh_abstract: 关于住房市场的标准观点认为，当地住房供给灵活性的差异——由地理和监管等因素塑造——解释了美国各城市房价和住房数量增长对需求上升的不同反应。然而，从2000年到2020年，我们发现，无论一个城市估计的住房供给弹性如何，更高的收入增长都预示着相同的房价、住房数量和人口增长。当我们考察租金、将样本扩展到1980年至2020年、使用不同的弹性衡量指标、使用人均收入或人口增长而非总收入增长，以及利用当地住房需求的各种外生变化时，我们得到了相同的结果。使用一个通用的供需框架，我们表明这些结果意味着，估计的住房供给约束在解释美国各城市房价上涨差异方面并不重要。我们的结论挑战了关于当地住房和劳动力市场的主流观点，并表明放松监管性的住房供给约束可能不会实质性地影响住房可负担性。
33576.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E22, J61, R21, R31, R52

33575.title: Racial Disparities and Bias in Consumer Bankruptcy
33575.zh_title: 消费者破产中的种族差异与偏见
33575.authors: Bronson Argyle, Sasha Indarte, Benjamin Iverson, Christopher Palmer
33575.abstract: We document substantial racial disparities in consumer bankruptcy outcomes and investigate the role of racial bias in contributing to these disparities. Using data on the near universe of US bankruptcy cases and self-reported and manually-identified measures of race, we show that minority filers are unconditionally 12.7 and 2.3 percentage points more likely to have their bankruptcy cases dismissed without debt relief in Chapters 13 and 7, respectively. We uncover strong evidence of racial homophily: in Chapter 13, where trustees have more discretion, minority filers are 2.3 percentage points more likely to be dismissed when randomly assigned to a White bankruptcy trustee than to a minority trustee. Black and Hispanic Chapter 13 filers are the most negatively affected by homophily. To interpret our findings, we develop a general decision model and new identification results relating homophily to bias. Our homophily approach is particularly useful in settings where traditional outcome tests for bias are not feasible because the decision-maker's objective is not well defined or decision-relevant outcomes or risk factors are unobserved. Applying this framework to our homophily estimate implies that at least 15% of the unconditional Chapter 13 dismissal gap and 53% of the conditional dismissal gap for minority filers is due to either taste-based or inaccurate statistical discrimination.
33575.zh_abstract: 我们记录了消费者破产结果中显著的种族差异，并研究了种族偏见在造成这些差异中的作用。利用涵盖美国几乎所有破产案件的数据以及自我报告和人工识别的种族衡量指标，我们显示少数族裔申请人在第13章和第7章破产案件中，其案件在没有债务减免的情况下被驳回的可能性分别无条件高出12.7和2.3个百分点。我们发现了强烈的种族同质性证据：在第13章（受托人拥有更多自由裁量权）中，当少数族裔申请人被随机分配给一位白人破产受托人而非少数族裔受托人时，其案件被驳回的可能性高出2.3个百分点。黑人和西班牙裔的第13章破产申请人受同质性影响最为负面。为了解释我们的发现，我们开发了一个通用决策模型以及将同质性与偏见联系起来的新识别结果。我们的同质性方法在传统的结果检验因决策者目标不明确或决策相关结果或风险因素未被观测而不可行的情况下尤为有用。将这一框架应用于我们的同质性估计，意味着少数族裔申请人无条件第13章驳回差距中至少有15%，以及条件驳回差距中至少有53%，是由基于偏好的或不准确的统计歧视造成的。
33575.meta: Programs：CF, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C21, D63, G51, J15, K35

33574.title: Human Capital at Home: Evidence from a Randomized Evaluation in the Philippines
33574.zh_title: 家庭中的人力资本：来自菲律宾随机评估的证据
33574.authors: Noam Angrist, Sarah Kabay, Dean Karlan, Lincoln Lau, Kevin Wong
33574.abstract: Children spend most of their time at home in their early years, yet efforts to promote human capital at home in many low- and middle-income settings remain limited. We conduct a randomized controlled trial to evaluate an intervention which encourages parents and caregivers to foster human capital accumulation among their children between ages 3 and 5, with a focus on math and phonics skills. Children gain 0.52 and 0.51 standard deviations relative to the control group on math and phonics tests, respectively (p<0.001). A year later effects persist, but math gains dissipate to 0.15 (p=0.06) and phonics to 0.13 (p=0.12). We also measure impacts on parents, including both fathers and mothers. Effects appear to be mediated largely through instructional support by parents and not other parent investment mechanisms, such as more positive parent-child interactions or additional time spent on education at home beyond the intervention. We also do not find any crowd-out effects on labor market outcomes, likely since the approach tested is efficient, delivering learning gains in a short period of time.
33574.zh_abstract: 儿童在早期大部分时间都在家中度过，然而在许多中低收入环境中，促进家庭人力资本的努力仍然有限。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，以评估一项鼓励父母和照顾者在3至5岁儿童中促进人力资本积累的干预措施，重点关注数学和语音技能。与对照组相比，儿童在数学和语音测试中分别获得了0.52和0.51个标准差的提升（p<0.001）。一年后，效果仍然存在，但数学收益降至0.15（p=0.06），语音收益降至0.13（p=0.12）。我们还测量了对父母（包括父亲和母亲）的影响。效果似乎主要通过父母的教学支持来中介，而非其他父母投资机制，例如更积极的亲子互动或超出干预范围的在家庭教育上投入的额外时间。我们也没有发现对劳动力市场结果的任何挤出效应，这可能是因为所测试的方法效率较高，能在短时间内带来学习收益。

33573.title: Expert Patients’ Use of Avoidable Health Care
33573.zh_title: 专家患者对可避免医疗服务的利用
33573.authors: Pragya Kakani, Simone Matecna, Amitabh Chandra
33573.abstract: We measure whether expert patients – those trained as physicians and nurses – have fewer emergency department visits and the reasons for these differences. Compared to similar patients, physicians and nurses had 19.8% and 5.1% fewer ED visits, principally due to fewer avoidable visits. The differences in avoidable visits between physicians and other patients were largest for diagnoses that often require prescriptions, which physicians often self-prescribed. Our results suggest that improving access to legitimate prescriptions for acute symptoms, more than improving patient education, can reduce avoidable health care.
33573.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了专家患者——即受过医生和护士培训的人——是否更少使用急诊科服务，以及这些差异的原因。与类似的患者相比，医生和护士的急诊就诊次数分别减少了19.8%和5.1%，这主要是由于可避免的就诊次数减少。医生与其他患者之间可避免就诊的差异，在通常需要处方的诊断中最大，而医生经常自行开药。我们的结果表明，改善急性症状合法处方的获取途径，比改善患者教育更能减少可避免的医疗服务使用。

33572.title: Expropriation Without Compensation: Copper in Chile, 1970-1973
33572.zh_title: 无补偿的征收：智利的铜矿，1970-1973
33572.abstract: In this essay, I analyze the nationalization of large copper mines during Salvador Allende’s socialist government in Chile in the 1970s. This is one of the earliest cases “nationalization without compensation.” Chile’s legal argument was based on the novel idea that “adequate” payment should be calculated as book value minus “excessive profits.” In turn, excessive profits were defined, for every year, as profits above 12% of book value. I analyze the economic arguments that led to nationalization, and I deconstruct and critically evaluate the methodology used to calculate “excessive profits” and “adequate compensation.” I analyze the US and multinationals’ response to Chile’s nationalization policies.
33572.zh_abstract: 在这篇文章中，我分析了20世纪70年代萨尔瓦多·阿连德社会主义政府时期智利大型铜矿的国有化。这是最早的“无补偿国有化”案例之一。智利的法律论据基于一个新颖的观点，即“适当”补偿应计算为账面价值减去“超额利润”。而超额利润被定义为每年超过账面价值12%的利润。我分析了导致国有化的经济论点，并解构和批判性地评估了用于计算“超额利润”和“适当补偿”的方法。我分析了美国及跨国公司对智利国有化政策的回应。

33571.title: From Access to Wellness: Early Life Exposure to Abortion Legalization and the Next Generation’s Health
33571.zh_title: 从可及性到健康：早期生活接触堕胎合法化与下一代健康
33571.authors: Hamid Noghanibehambari, David Slusky, Hoa Vu
33571.abstract: We examine the multigenerational impacts of legalized abortion in the United States by analyzing how early-life exposure to this policy shift affects birth outcomes in the next generation. Using event study and two-way fixed effects models, we link maternal early-life exposure to legal abortion with improved birth outcomes in the subsequent generation, including higher birth weights and reduced rates of low birth weight. Our analysis of the mechanisms shows that these improvements in birth outcomes are not driven by changes in maternal racial or age composition within the treated generation. Instead, enhanced educational attainment and increased prenatal care utilization among the treated generation appear to play a critical role. Our results highlight the far-reaching implications of reproductive health policies, especially relevant in the post-Dobbs era, where access may once again become constrained for many.
33571.zh_abstract: 我们通过分析早期生活接触这一政策转变如何影响下一代的出生结果，来考察美国堕胎合法化的多代影响。使用事件研究和双向固定效应模型，我们将母亲早期生活接触合法堕胎与下一代出生结果的改善联系起来，包括更高的出生体重和更低的低出生体重率。我们对机制的分析表明，这些出生结果的改善并非由受处理一代母亲种族或年龄构成的变化所驱动。相反，受处理一代教育程度的提高和产前保健利用的增加似乎发挥了关键作用。我们的结果突显了生殖健康政策的深远影响，这在后多布斯时代尤其相关，因为对许多人来说，可及性可能再次受到限制。
33571.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：H75, I12, I18, J13, J16, J18

33570.title: Standardized Test Scores and Academic Performance at Ivy-Plus Colleges
33570.zh_title: 标准化考试成绩与常春藤Plus大学的学业表现
33570.authors: John N. Friedman, Bruce Sacerdote, Douglas O. Staiger, Michele Tine
33570.abstract: We analyze admissions and transcript records for students at multiple Ivy-Plus colleges to study the relationship between standardized (SAT/ACT) test scores, high school GPA, and first-year college grades. Standardized test scores predict academic outcomes with a normalized slope four times greater than that from high school GPA, all conditional on students’ race, gender, and socioeconomic status. Standardized test scores also exhibit no calibration bias, as they do not underpredict college performance for students from less advantaged backgrounds. Collectively these results suggest that standardized test scores provide important information to measure applicants’ academic preparation that is not available elsewhere in the application file.
33570.zh_abstract: 我们分析了多所常春藤Plus大学学生的录取和成绩单记录，以研究标准化（SAT/ACT）考试成绩、高中GPA与大学一年级成绩之间的关系。在控制了学生的种族、性别和社会经济地位后，标准化考试成绩预测学业成果的标准化斜率是高中GPA的四倍以上。标准化考试成绩也没有表现出校准偏差，因为它们不会低估来自弱势背景学生的大学表现。总的来说，这些结果表明，标准化考试成绩提供了衡量申请人学业准备的重要信息，而这些信息在申请文件的其他地方是无法获得的。

33569.title: The Effects of Competition in the Retail Gasoline Industry
33569.zh_title: 零售汽油行业竞争的影响
33569.abstract: We estimate the effect of competition on incumbent firm pricing by using high-frequency price data and the precise geographic location for all gas stations in California. Using an event-study design, we find that the entry of a new station is associated with an immediate, persistent 2.7-cent decrease in prices at incumbent stores, which equates to a 7% reduction in estimated retail markups. In contrast, nearby exit results in precisely estimated null effects on prices. We do not find that observable differences in station characteristics explain the asymmetry. Rather, we find that selective exit from more competitive markets and less heavily-trafficked stations explains the null results for exit. We discuss the relevance of our estimates to current environmental policy related to the decarbonization of light-duty transportation and zoning and environmental restrictions on gasoline stations.
33569.zh_abstract: 我们利用高频价格数据和加州所有加油站的精确地理位置，估计了竞争对现有企业定价的影响。通过事件研究设计，我们发现，新加油站的进入与现有门店价格立即且持续下降2.7美分相关，这相当于估计的零售加成率下降了7%。相比之下，附近加油站的退出对价格产生了精确估计的零效应。我们没有发现加油站特征的显著差异可以解释这种不对称性。相反，我们发现，从竞争更激烈的市场和交通流量较少的加油站中选择性退出，解释了退出带来的零效应。我们讨论了我们的估计与当前与轻型交通脱碳以及加油站的区划和环境限制相关的环境政策的相关性。

33568.title: Recovering Credible Trade Elasticities from Incredible Trade Reforms
33568.zh_title: 从不可信的贸易改革中恢复可信的贸易弹性
33568.authors: George A. Alessandria, Shafaat Yar Khan, Armen Khederlarian, Kim J. Ruhl, Joseph B. Steinberg
33568.abstract: We study how trade-policy dynamics affect the dynamics of trade volumes and the implications of these effects for estimates of the trade elasticity. We use data on US imports and trade policy from 1974–2017 for China and Vietnam—the countries with the largest import growth and the largest tariff reductions over the last fifty years—and a heterogeneous-firm dynamic trade model to recover the dynamic path of the trade elasticity following an unanticipated, permanent tariff change. We estimate a short-run trade elasticity of about three and a long-run trade elasticity of about 14, and find that it takes about five years to close half of the gap between the current and long-run levels of trade. We argue that the expected dynamics of future trade policy before and after these reforms biases down reduced-form estimates of the long-run trade elasticity and biases up estimates of the short-run elasticity. We argue that these measurement issues are even more problematic for other trade reforms, especially those within the Normal Trade Relations (NTR) regime that constitute the majority of the data.
33568.zh_abstract: 我们研究贸易政策动态如何影响贸易量动态，以及这些效应对贸易弹性估计的影响。我们利用1974年至2017年美国从中国和越南（过去五十年中进口增长最大和关税削减最大的国家）的进口和贸易政策数据，以及一个异质性企业动态贸易模型，来恢复在意外、永久性关税变化后贸易弹性的动态路径。我们估计短期贸易弹性约为3，长期贸易弹性约为14，并发现大约需要五年时间才能弥合当前贸易水平与长期贸易水平之间差距的一半。我们认为，这些改革前后未来贸易政策的预期动态，会向下偏误长期贸易弹性的简化形式估计，并向上偏误短期弹性的估计。我们认为，这些测量问题对于其他贸易改革，尤其是构成数据大部分的“正常贸易关系”（NTR）体制内的改革，问题更为严重。

33567.title: A Guide to Macroeconomics and Climate Change
33567.zh_title: 宏观经济学与气候变化指南
33567.abstract: This paper analyzes the literature that links macroeconomics and climate change. We organize our paper around three themes: (i) loss and damage, which assesses long-run economic costs and non-market impacts from climate change; (ii) mitigation and the energy transition, which evaluates the macroeconomic consequences of shifting away from fossil fuels toward renewable energy; and (iii) adaptation, which explores the economic adjustments necessary to manage heat stress, more frequent severe weather events and rising seas. We discuss macroeconomic frameworks that incorporate these forces as well as empirical estimates that guide their calibration. We suggest areas in which macroeconomic research on climate is needed.
33567.zh_abstract: 本文分析了将宏观经济学与气候变化联系起来的文献。我们围绕三个主题组织论文：（i）损失与损害，评估气候变化带来的长期经济成本和非市场影响；（ii）减缓与能源转型，评估从化石燃料转向可再生能源的宏观经济后果；（iii）适应，探讨管理热应激、更频繁的恶劣天气事件和海平面上升所需的经济调整。我们讨论了纳入这些力量的宏观经济框架，以及指导其校准的实证估计。我们提出了需要对气候进行宏观经济研究的领域。
33567.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E60, F55, H23, H41, Q43, Q50, R10

33566.title: A Quest for AI Knowledge
33566.zh_title: 对人工智能知识的探索
33566.abstract: This paper examines how AI tools that excel at interpolating existing knowledge affect scientific research directions. Using a model where AI assists both scientists (S-AI) and decision-makers (DM-AI), it is shown that AI’s impact on research novelty is non-monotonic and depends critically on capability thresholds. While S-AI predictably encourages knowledge consolidation by reducing costs within established domains—potentially creating distinct pockets of deepening—DM-AI generates surprising effects. With limited capabilities, scientists ignore DM-AI. In a moderate regime, scientists “work to the AI,” constraining novelty to match AI’s operational range. Only with sufficiently advanced DM-AI do scientists unambiguously pursue more novel research. The strong complementarity between AI capabilities and knowledge gaps means that moderate AI may reduce research ambition. These findings challenge the conventional wisdom that interpolative AI uniformly pushes science toward consolidation, revealing a nuanced relationship between AI capabilities and scientific progress instead.
33566.zh_abstract: 本文研究了擅长插值现有知识的人工智能工具如何影响科学研究方向。使用一个模型，其中人工智能既协助科学家（S-AI）也协助决策者（DM-AI），结果表明人工智能对研究新颖性的影响是非单调的，并且关键取决于能力阈值。虽然S-AI通过降低既定领域内的成本，可预测地鼓励知识整合——可能创造不同的深化区域——但DM-AI产生了令人惊讶的效应。当能力有限时，科学家会忽略DM-AI。在中等能力状态下，科学家“为人工智能而工作”，限制新颖性以匹配人工智能的操作范围。只有当DM-AI足够先进时，科学家才会明确地追求更新颖的研究。人工智能能力与知识差距之间的强互补性意味着中等水平的人工智能可能会降低研究雄心。这些发现挑战了插值型人工智能会统一推动科学走向整合的传统观点，反而揭示了人工智能能力与科学进步之间微妙的关联。

33565.title: A Test of the Efficiency of a Given Portfolio in High Dimensions
33565.zh_title: 高维情况下给定投资组合有效性的检验
33565.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Johannes Schwab
33565.abstract: We extend the Gibbons–Ross–Shanken test to high-dimensional cases, when the num-ber of test assets far exceeds the sample size and the return covariance matrix is ill-conditioned or singular, as inevitably occurs with large, richly specified test port-folios. In such cases, one must use a regularized (and therefore biased) estimator of the covariance matrix, which distorts the original GRS test statistic. We use Random Matrix Theory to correct for this bias and characterize the asymptotic power of the resulting test. Power increases with the number of test assets and reaches its maximum across a broad range of local alternatives. These findings are supported by extensive simulations. We empirically implement the test on state-of-the-art candidate factor portfolios and test assets to evaluate conditional asset pricing performance.
33565.zh_abstract: 我们将Gibbons-Ross-Shanken检验扩展到高维情况，即当测试资产数量远超样本量且收益协方差矩阵病态或奇异时，这在大规模、丰富设定的测试组合中不可避免。在这种情况下，必须使用正则化（因此有偏）的协方差矩阵估计量，这会扭曲原始的GRS检验统计量。我们使用随机矩阵理论来纠正这种偏误，并描述由此产生的检验的渐近功效。功效随测试资产数量增加而增加，并在广泛的局部备择假设范围内达到最大值。这些发现得到了广泛模拟的支持。我们在实证中，对最先进的候选因子组合和测试资产实施该检验，以评估条件资产定价表现。

33564.title: Methane Abatement Costs in the Oil and Gas Industry: Survey and Synthesis
33564.zh_title: 石油和天然气行业的甲烷减排成本：调查与综合
33564.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Forest L. Reinhardt, Robert N. Stavins
33564.abstract: There is growing recognition of the relative importance of anthropogenic emissions of methane as a contributor to global climate change. An important source of such emissions in some countries, including the United States, is the oil and gas (O&G) sector. This points to the importance of developing understanding of the marginal abatement cost functions for methane emissions reductions. Scholars have employed a diverse set of methodologies to estimate abatement costs, including engineering cost models, econometric analysis of natural gas markets, and statistical retrospective analysis of state-level regulation. We critically examine these approaches and synthesize their results. We find significant potential for low-cost methane abatement in the O&G sector in the United States and elsewhere, although claims of widespread negative abatement cost opportunities should be taken with a grain of salt. We also find that the potential for low-cost abatement is not without limit. Whereas it appears that cutting methane emissions in half would be relatively inexpensive, a sharp uptick in marginal abatement cost may occur when reductions exceed 60 to 80 percent below baseline levels. This threshold may change over time with technological advances in remote sensing, which can reduce abatement costs at various levels of ambition.
33564.zh_abstract: 人们越来越认识到人为甲烷排放作为全球气候变化贡献者的相对重要性。在一些国家，包括美国，石油和天然气（O&G）部门是此类排放的重要来源。这表明了发展对甲烷排放削减的边际减排成本函数理解的重要性。学者们采用了多种方法来估计减排成本，包括工程成本模型、天然气市场的计量经济分析以及州级监管的统计回顾分析。我们批判性地审视这些方法并综合其结果。我们发现，在美国和其他地方的石油和天然气部门，存在显著的低成本甲烷减排潜力，尽管对广泛存在的负减排成本机会的说法应持保留态度。我们还发现，低成本减排的潜力并非没有限制。虽然将甲烷排放量减半似乎相对便宜，但当减排量超过基线水平的60%至80%时，边际减排成本可能会急剧上升。随着遥感技术的进步，这一阈值可能会随时间变化，这可以在不同雄心水平上降低减排成本。

33563.title: The Academic Consequences of Affirmative Action Bans Combined with Diversity Targets
33563.zh_title: 平权行动禁令与多元化目标结合后的学术后果
33563.abstract: This paper examines the problem of a college affected by both a legal ban on affirmative action in admissions and pressure to raise enrollment of underrepresented minorities (URMs), as exemplified by UCLA, which adopted a holistic admissions process in 2006 in response to protests over low URM enrollment. The new process increased the URM share of admitted students by about 3 percentage points, but the primary effects of the changes were on admissions decisions within racial/ethnic groups. Within all groups, admission rates for applicants with high SAT scores and low income and parental education declined. Measured relative to UCLA’s pre-2006 revealed preferences, achieving the increase in URM admissions via holistic admissions was roughly 4-5 times as costly as doing so via a simple reallocation of slots between groups. Had UCLA complied with a stricter interpretation of the affirmative action ban, it would have been significantly more costly.
33563.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一所大学同时面临招生中平权行动的法律禁令和提高代表性不足少数族裔（URM）入学率的压力时的问题，以加州大学洛杉矶分校（UCLA）为例，该校因URM入学率低引发抗议，于2006年采用了整体性审查录取流程。新流程使被录取学生中URM的比例提高了约3个百分点，但这些变化的主要影响在于种族/族裔群体内部的录取决定。在所有群体中，SAT高分但低收入和父母教育程度低的申请者的录取率下降了。相对于UCLA在2006年之前揭示的偏好，通过整体性审查实现URM录取率的增加，其成本大约是通过在群体间简单重新分配名额实现该目标的4到5倍。如果UCLA遵守对平权行动禁令更严格的解释，其成本将会显著更高。

33562.title: In-kind Government Assistance and Crowd-out of Charitable Services: Evidence from Free School Meals
33562.zh_title: 政府实物援助对慈善服务的挤出效应：来自免费学校餐的证据
33562.authors: Krista J. Ruffini, Orgul Ozturk, Pelin Pekgun
33562.abstract: Many community organizations provide services similar to government programs, but there is limited evidence how increased government aid affects the use and availability of charitable services. This study examines how greater access to federal nutrition assistance through schoolwide free meal programs affects food bank use within the U.S.’s largest food bank network. A 10 percent increase in access to free school meals reduces the amount of food that food banks distribute by 0.9-1.4 percent, without significantly reducing donations, fundraising activity, or the amount of food available. The reduction of food bank use is only found in areas where relatively few students previously qualified for government aid. Our findings highlight that even safety net programs that serve a specific population and offer distinct services can reduce pressures on charitable organizations, particularly in areas previously underserved by government assistance.
33562.zh_abstract: 许多社区组织提供与政府项目类似的服务，但关于增加政府援助如何影响慈善服务的使用和可用性的证据有限。本研究考察了通过全校免费餐计划增加联邦营养援助的可及性，如何影响美国最大食品银行网络内的食品银行使用。免费学校餐可及性每增加10%，食品银行分发的食物量就会减少0.9-1.4%，而不会显著减少捐赠、筹款活动或可用食物量。食品银行使用的减少仅出现在先前符合政府援助条件的学生相对较少的地区。我们的研究结果强调，即使是服务于特定人群并提供独特服务的安全网项目，也能减轻慈善组织的压力，特别是在以前政府援助服务不足的地区。

33561.title: New Data and Insights in Regional and Urban Economics
33561.zh_title: 区域与城市经济学的新数据与新见解
33561.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Adam Storeygard
33561.abstract: This chapter surveys new data sources employed in urban and regional economics in the past decade and the insights they have enabled. We first provide a primer on the data sources, including advantages, disadvantages and use cases. Historical data sources include linked census records as well as digitized maps and directories. Contemporary data come from satellites, mobile phones, social media and wikis, posted prices and listings, e-commerce and payment card transactions, newly available administrative sources, and text, among others. We then discuss the advances these data have enabled in substantive areas throughout urban and regional economics, with historical and contemporary examples in each area. We conclude with some predictions and warnings
33561.zh_abstract: 本章调查了过去十年城市与区域经济学中采用的新数据来源及其所带来的见解。我们首先提供了这些数据来源的入门介绍，包括其优势、劣势和使用案例。历史数据来源包括关联的人口普查记录，以及数字化的地图和目录。当代数据则来自卫星、手机、社交媒体和维基、挂牌价格和列表、电子商务和支付卡交易、新近可获得的行政数据来源以及文本等。接着，我们讨论了这些数据在区域与城市经济学各实质性领域中所推动的进展，并在每个领域提供了历史和当代的案例。最后，我们提出了一些预测和警示。

33560.title: The Optimal Monetary Policy Response to Tariffs
33560.zh_title: 关税的最优货币政策应对
33560.abstract: What is the optimal monetary policy response to tariffs? This paper explores this question within an open-economy New Keynesian model, characterizes the macroeconomic effects of tariffs, and shows that the optimal monetary policy response is expansionary, with inflation rising above and beyond the direct effects of tariffs. This result holds regardless of whether tariffs apply to consumption goods or intermediate inputs, whether the shock is temporary or permanent, and whether terms of trade are exogenous or endogenous. When tariffs address other distortions, monetary policy remains expansionary, but the inflationary effects are mitigated.
33560.zh_abstract: 关税的最优货币政策应对是什么？本文在一个开放经济的新凯恩斯主义模型中探讨了这一问题，描述了关税的宏观经济效应，并表明最优货币政策应对是扩张性的，通胀上升幅度超过关税的直接效应。无论关税适用于消费品还是中间投入品，无论冲击是暂时的还是永久的，无论贸易条件是外生的还是内生的，这一结果都成立。当关税用于解决其他扭曲时，货币政策仍然是扩张性的，但通胀效应会减弱。
33560.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E24, E44, E52, F13, F41

33599.title: Beyond Tariffs: How Did China’s State–Owned Enterprises Shape the US–China Trade War?
33599.zh_title: 超越关税：中国国有企业如何塑造了中美贸易战？
33599.abstract: We study the role played by Chinese state–owned firms during the US–China trade war. Based on measures constructed from Chinese firm–level customs microdata, we show that the presence of state–owned enterprises (SOEs) in Chinese imports led to a large negative impact on US exports in addition to the effect of tariffs. Abstracting from general equilibrium effects, while tariffs account for an 8% decline in US exports to China, the SOE effect accounts for a 4% decline. This SOE effect was concentrated toward the end of 2018 and start of 2019, point at which a vast majority of products had already been targeted by tariffs. Further, the SOE effect was concentrated among agricultural goods and industrial supplies, as well as among industries located in US regions with a high share of Republican votes. We also find that US exports were rerouted to the rest of the world in response to Chinese tariffs, but not in response to reduced imports by Chinese SOEs.
33599.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国国有企业在中美贸易战期间所扮演的角色。基于从中国企业层面海关微观数据构建的指标，我们表明，除了关税的影响之外，中国进口中国有企业的存在对美国出口产生了巨大的负面影响。撇开一般均衡效应，虽然关税导致美国对华出口下降8%，但国有企业效应则导致下降4%。这种国有企业效应集中在2018年底和2019年初，当时绝大多数产品已经成为关税目标。此外，国有企业效应集中在农产品和工业用品，以及位于美国共和党选票占比较高的地区的行业。我们还发现，美国出口因中国关税而转向世界其他地区，但并未因中国国有企业进口减少而出现转口。

33598.title: Cloze Encounters: The Impact of Pirated Data Access on LLM Performance
33598.zh_title: 完形填空遭遇：盗版数据访问对大型语言模型性能的影响
33598.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in text generation, but their performance may be influenced by the datasets on which they are trained, including potentially unauthorized or pirated content. We investigate the extent to which data access through pirated books influences LLM responses. We test the performance of leading foundation models (GPT, Claude, Llama, and Gemini) on a set of books that were and were not included in the Books3 dataset, which contains full-text pirated books and could be used for LLM training. We assess book-level performance using the “name cloze” word-prediction task. To examine the causal effect of Books3 inclusion we employ an instrumental variables strategy that exploits the pattern of book publication years in the Books3 dataset. In our sample of 12,916 books, we find significant improvements in LLM name cloze accuracy on books available within the Books3 dataset compared to those not present in these data. These effects are more pronounced for less popular books as compared to more popular books and vary across leading models. These findings have crucial implications for the economics of digitization, copyright policy, and the design and training of AI systems.
33598.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型在文本生成方面展现了卓越的能力，但其性能可能受到训练所用数据集的影响，包括潜在的未经授权或盗版内容。我们调查了通过盗版书籍获取数据在多大程度上影响大型语言模型的响应。我们测试了领先的基础模型（GPT、Claude、Llama和Gemini）在一组包含在Books3数据集和未包含在其中的书籍上的表现。Books3数据集包含全文盗版书籍，并可能用于大型语言模型训练。我们使用“名称完形填空”单词预测任务来评估书籍层面的性能。为了检验Books3包含的因果效应，我们采用了一种工具变量策略，利用了Books3数据集中书籍出版年份的模式。在我们的12,916本书样本中，我们发现，与不在该数据集中的书籍相比，大型语言模型在Books3数据集中可用的书籍上的名称完形填空准确性有显著提高。这些效应对不太受欢迎的书籍比更受欢迎的书籍更为明显，并且在各个领先模型之间有所不同。这些发现对数字化经济学、版权政策以及人工智能系统的设计和训练具有重要影响。

33597.title: Sewers and Urbanization in the Developing World
33597.zh_title: 下水道与发展中国家的城市化
33597.authors: Sean E. McCulloch, Matthew P. Schaelling, Matthew Turner, Toru Kitagawa
33597.abstract: We investigate the effects of sewer access on developing world cities. It is more difficult to move sewage uphill than downhill, so similar neighborhoods on opposite sides of drainage basin divides face different costs of sewer access. We identify the effect of sewers by comparing outcomes for neighborhoods on opposite sides of drainage basin divides. On average, sewers in Brazil, Colombia, South Africa, Jordan, and Tanzania cause large increases in population density and moderate changes in demographics. There is evidence for heterogeneous effects across countries. Estimates suggest that sewers are as important for the geography of cities as transportation infrastructure.
33597.zh_abstract: 我们研究了下水道接入对发展中国家城市的影响。将污水向上坡输送比向下坡输送更困难，因此位于流域分水岭两侧的相似社区面临不同的下水道接入成本。我们通过比较流域分水岭两侧社区的结果来识别下水道的影响。平均而言，巴西、哥伦比亚、南非、约旦和坦桑尼亚的下水道导致人口密度大幅增加，人口结构发生适度变化。有证据表明各国之间存在异质性效应。估计表明，下水道对于城市地理的重要性与交通基础设施相当。

33596.title: Does Fund Size Affect Private Equity Performance? Evidence from Donation Inflows to Private Universities
33596.zh_title: 基金规模会影响私募股权业绩吗？来自私立大学捐赠流入的证据
33596.authors: Abhishek Bhardwaj, Abhinav Gupta, Sabrina T. Howell, Kyle Zimmerschied
33596.abstract: Do returns in private equity (PE) rise or fall with fund scale? This question is increasingly urgent amid larger funds and new focus on the retail market. Since better managers can raise larger funds, the causal effect is difficult to identify. We develop an instrument based on gifts to universities, which lead to more capital for managers with preexisting relationships. We show decreasing returns; for example, a 1% size increase reduces net IRR by 0.1 percentage points. Larger funds do larger deals, which perform worse. We find no change in risk, in part because additional deals are more levered.
33596.zh_abstract: 私募股权（PE）的回报是随着基金规模扩大而上升还是下降？在基金规模日益增大且市场新关注零售市场的背景下，这个问题愈发紧迫。由于表现更好的管理者能够筹集到更大的基金，其因果效应难以识别。我们开发了一个基于大学捐赠的工具变量，这导致与管理者存在既有关系的资金增加。我们显示出递减的回报；例如，规模增加1%会使净内部收益率降低0.1个百分点。规模更大的基金进行更大的交易，而这些交易表现更差。我们发现风险没有变化，部分原因是额外交易的杠杆率更高。

33595.title: Homeownership and Attention to Inflation: Evidence from Information Treatments
33595.zh_title: 住房所有权与对通胀的关注：来自信息干预实验的证据
33595.abstract: This paper examines how homeownership status shapes attention to inflation and its impact on durable consumption. Using randomized controlled trials on U.S. households (2021–2023), we document systematic heterogeneity in responses to inflation-related information. Homeowners exhibit greater baseline awareness and update their expectations less than renters. Exploiting exogenous variation in inflation expectations induced by the treatments, we find that homeowners adjust durable spending significantly, whereas renters do not. These results highlight homeownership as a key factor in the formation of inflation expectations and their influence on economic behavior.
33595.zh_abstract: 本文研究了住房所有权状况如何塑造对通胀的关注及其对耐用品消费的影响。通过对美国家庭（2021-2023年）进行随机对照试验，我们记录了在通胀相关信息反应上的系统性异质性。房主表现出更高的基线认知水平，并且其预期的更新幅度小于租房者。利用由干预实验引起的外生通胀预期变化，我们发现房主会显著调整耐用品支出，而租房者则不会。这些结果凸显了住房所有权是通胀预期形成及其对经济行为影响的关键因素。
33595.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C93, D12, D84, E21, E31, R21

33594.title: Optimal Formula Instruments
33594.abstract: When estimating the effects of treatments defined by complex formulas, researchers often use simple functions of exogenous shocks as instruments. A leading example is “simulated instruments” for public policy eligibility, which capture variation in state-level policy generosity. We show how more powerful instruments can be constructed by incorporating heterogeneous shock exposure while using a recentering procedure to avoid bias. We characterize the asymptotically efficient instruments in this class and propose an algorithm for constructing feasible approximations to them. Compared to a simulated instrument approach, our approach yields a 44% smaller standard error on the private insurance crowd-out effect of Medicaid enrollment from the 2014 Affordable Care Act expansions.
33594.zh_abstract: 在估计由复杂公式定义的处理效应时，研究者通常使用外生冲击的简单函数作为工具变量。一个主要的例子是用于公共政策资格的“模拟工具变量”，它捕捉了州级政策慷慨度的变化。我们展示了如何通过纳入异质性冲击暴露程度，同时使用中心化程序来避免偏误，从而构建更有效的工具变量。我们刻画了此类工具变量中渐近有效的工具变量特征，并提出了一种构建其可行近似值的算法。与模拟工具变量方法相比，我们的方法在2014年《平价医疗法案》扩展中，关于医疗补助参保对私人保险挤出效应的标准误降低了44%。

33593.title: Strategic Digitization in Currency and Payment Competition
33593.zh_title: 货币与支付竞争中的战略数字化
33593.abstract: We model the competition between digital forms of fiat money and private digital money (PDM). Countries strategically digitize their fiat money — upgrading existing or launching new payment systems (including CBDCs) — to enhance adoption and counter PDM competition. A pecking order emerges: less dominant currencies digitize earlier, reflecting a first-mover advantage; dominant currencies delay digitization until they face competition; the weakest currencies forgo digitization. Delayed digitization allows PDM to gain dominance, eventually weakening fiat money’s role. We also highlight how geopolitical considerations, stablecoins, and interoperability between fiat and private digital money shape the digitization of money and monetary competition.
33593.zh_abstract: 我们对法定货币的数字形式与私人数字货币（PDM）之间的竞争进行了建模。各国战略性地将其法定货币数字化——升级现有支付系统或推出新支付系统（包括央行数字货币）——以增强采用率并应对PDM的竞争。一种层级顺序由此显现：较不占主导地位的货币更早进行数字化，反映了先发优势；占主导地位的货币会推迟数字化，直到面临竞争；最弱势的货币则放弃数字化。延迟数字化使得PDM获得主导地位，最终削弱法定货币的作用。我们还强调了地缘政治考量、稳定币以及法定货币与私人数字货币之间的互操作性如何塑造货币数字化进程与货币竞争。
33593.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM；JEL：E50, E58, F30, G18, G50, O33

33592.title: The Economics of Healthcare Fraud
33592.abstract: Healthcare fraud imposes a sizable cost on U.S. public healthcare budgets and distorts health care provision. We examine the economics of health care fraud and enforcement using theory and data and connect to a growing literature on the topic. We first offer a new economic definition of health care fraud that captures and connects the wide range of activities prosecuted as fraud. We define fraud as any divergence between the care an insurer says a patient qualifies for, the care a provider provides, and the care a provider bills for. Our definition clarifies the economic consequences of different categories of fraud and provides a framework for understanding the slate of existing studies. Next, we examine the incentives for committing and for prosecuting fraud. We show how fraud is driven by a combination of inadequate (expected) penalties for fraud and imperfect reimbursement rates. Public anti-fraud litigation is driven by the relative monetary, political or career returns to prosecuting fraud and by prosecutorial budgets. Finally, we examine the prevalence of health care fraud prosecutions across types of fraud and types of care, and across the US, by machine learning on text data from Department of Justice press releases.
33592.zh_abstract: 医疗欺诈给美国公共医疗预算带来了巨大成本，并扭曲了医疗服务的提供。我们利用理论和数据考察了医疗欺诈与执法的经济学，并与该领域日益增长的文献相联系。我们首先提出了一个关于医疗欺诈的新经济学定义，该定义捕捉并连接了被作为欺诈起诉的广泛活动。我们将欺诈定义为：保险公司声称患者有资格获得的医疗服务、医疗服务提供者实际提供的医疗服务以及医疗服务提供者开具账单的医疗服务之间的任何差异。我们的定义阐明了不同类别欺诈的经济后果，并为理解现有研究提供了一个框架。接下来，我们考察了实施欺诈和起诉欺诈的激励因素。我们展示了欺诈是如何由不充分的（预期）欺诈惩罚与不完善的报销率共同驱动的。公共反欺诈诉讼则受到起诉欺诈的相对货币、政治或职业回报以及起诉预算的驱动。最后，我们通过机器学习美国司法部新闻稿中的文本数据，考察了医疗欺诈起诉在不同欺诈类型、不同医疗服务类型以及美国各地的普遍程度。

33591.title: Political Ideology and U.S. Electric Vehicle Adoption
33591.zh_title: 政治意识形态与美国电动汽车普及
33591.authors: Lucas W. Davis, Jing Li, Katalin Springel
33591.abstract: The prospect for electric vehicles (EVs) as a climate change solution hinges on their widespread adoption across political lines. This paper uses county-level data to show that from 2012-2023, about half of all new EV registrations in the U.S. went to the 10% most Democratic counties. This correlation remains largely stable over time, though EV trucks show a lower correlation than other EV types. We also conducted a survey, finding no difference in the ability of Democrats and Republicans to identify EVs. Overall, our results suggest that barriers to widespread U.S. EV adoption may be greater than anticipated.
33591.zh_abstract: 电动汽车作为气候变化解决方案的前景，取决于其在各政治派别中的广泛普及。本文利用县级数据显示，从2012年到2023年，美国所有新电动汽车注册量中约有一半流向了最倾向民主党的10%的县。这种相关性随时间推移基本保持稳定，尽管电动皮卡的相关性低于其他类型的电动汽车。我们还进行了一项调查，发现民主党和共和党人在识别电动汽车的能力上没有差异。总体而言，我们的结果表明，美国电动汽车广泛普及的障碍可能比预期的要大。

33590.title: Shadow Always Touches the Feet: Implications of Bank Credit Lines to Non-Bank Financial Intermediaries
33590.zh_title: 阴影始终触及脚面：银行对非银行金融中介机构信贷额度的影响
33590.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Manasa Gopal, Maximilian Jager, Sascha Steffen
33590.abstract: We study the implications of banks extending credit lines to non-bank financial intermediaries (NBFIs), using real estate investment trusts (REITs) as an economically important example. While smaller banks hold significant direct exposures in CRE loans, the CRE exposure of large banks is also indirect via credit-line provision to REITs. REITs’ credit-line utilization is substantially more sensitive to market stress than for other publicly-traded NBFIs and corporates. In turn, large banks suffer drawdowns on credit lines to REITs and attendant equity corrections in stress times. Ignoring this NBFI credit-line channel understates the exposure of large banks to aggregate stress.
33590.zh_abstract: 我们以房地产投资信托基金（REITs）作为一个经济上重要的例子，研究了银行向非银行金融中介机构（NBFIs）提供信贷额度的影响。虽然小型银行在商业房地产（CRE）贷款中持有显著的直接风险敞口，但大型银行的CRE风险敞口也通过向REITs提供信贷额度而间接存在。REITs的信贷额度使用对市场压力的敏感度远高于其他公开交易的NBFIs和公司。反过来，大型银行在压力时期会遭受REITs信贷额度的提取以及随之而来的股权调整。忽略这一NBFI信贷额度渠道会低估大型银行对总体压力的风险敞口。

33589.title: Growth and Fluctuations Economies with Land Speculation
33589.zh_title: 土地投机下的增长与波动经济
33589.abstract: This paper considers growth and fluctuations in a standard Overlapping Generations (OLG) model with rational expectations, with land (a non-produced asset), credit frictions, and endogenous growth. Under plausible conditions, there can be multiple momentary equilibria, with the multiplicity itself depending on capital and land prices; this can give rise in turn to an infinity of rational expectations trajectories, all operating within bounds that can be calculated. Improvements in technology, while in the short run increasing GDP, may result in the equilibrium being unstable and fragile—and in the long run lead to a stagnation trap with lower GDP. The introduction of land increases the scope for fluctuations; the only rational expectations trajectories may entail fluctuations, with episodic unemployment and dynamic inefficiencies. With credit frictions, expansionary credit and financial policies may lead to lower growth, with the additional funds unevenly going to land speculation, diverting savings from productive investments, results consistent with empirical evidence. The analysis resolves several theoretical puzzles, such as how can land prices be finite with an interest rate less than the growth rate. It shows that even with two state variables, a tractable OLG model can be constructed providing a global analysis of complex dynamics.
33589.zh_abstract: 本文在一个具有理性预期、土地（一种非生产性资产）、信贷摩擦和内生化增长的标准世代交叠（OLG）模型中考虑了增长与波动。在合理条件下，可能存在多个瞬时均衡，而多重性本身取决于资本和土地价格；这进而可能产生无限多的理性预期轨迹，所有这些轨迹都在可计算的边界内运行。技术进步虽然在短期内增加了GDP，但可能导致均衡变得不稳定和脆弱——并在长期内导致GDP更低的停滞陷阱。土地的引入增加了波动的范围；唯一的理性预期轨迹可能包含波动，伴随间歇性失业和动态无效率。在存在信贷摩擦的情况下，扩张性的信贷和金融政策可能导致增长放缓，新增资金不均等地流向土地投机，将储蓄从生产性投资中转移出来，这一结果与实证证据一致。该分析解决了几个理论难题，例如，在利率低于增长率的情况下，土地价格如何可能是有限的。它表明，即使有两个状态变量，也可以构建一个易于处理的OLG模型，以提供对复杂动态的全局分析。

33588.title: Defensive Hiring and Creative Destruction
33588.zh_title: 防御性雇佣与创造性破坏
33588.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yang Yu, Francesco Zanetti
33588.abstract: Defensive hiring of researchers by incumbent firms with monopsony power reduces creative destruction. This mechanism helps explain the simultaneous rise in R&D spending and decline in TFP growth in the US economy over recent decades. We develop a simple model highlighting the critical role of the inelastic supply of research labor in enabling this effect. Empirical evidence confirms that the research labor supply in the US is indeed inelastic and supports other model predictions: incumbent R&D spending is negatively correlated with creative destruction and sectoral TFP growth while extending incumbents' lifespan. All these effects are amplified when ideas are harder to find. An extended version of the model quantifies these mechanisms' implications for productivity, innovation, and policy.
33588.zh_abstract: 拥有垄断权力的在位企业对研究人员的防御性雇佣减少了创造性破坏。这一机制有助于解释近几十年来美国经济中研发支出上升与全要素生产率（TFP）增长下降同时发生的现象。我们开发了一个简单模型，强调了研究劳动力供给缺乏弹性在促成这一效应中的关键作用。实证证据证实，美国的研究劳动力供给确实缺乏弹性，并支持了模型的其他预测：在位企业的研发支出与创造性破坏和部门TFP增长呈负相关，同时延长了在位企业的寿命。当创意更难发现时，所有这些效应都会被放大。该模型的扩展版本量化了这些机制对生产率、创新和政策的影响。

33587.title: Liquidity Crises and the Market-Maker of Last Resort
33587.zh_title: 流动性危机与最后做市商
33587.authors: Charles Kahn, David Marshall, Robert L. McDonald
33587.abstract: We study market illiquidity in an economy subject to non-fundamental shocks. Asset trading occurs via decentralized one-on-one bargaining. The model has multiple rational expectations equilibria; we associate certain Pareto inferior equilibria with liquidity crises. The government can improve welfare by acting as a “market-maker of last resort” (MMLR), purchasing assets at above-market prices. Several policies employed by the US during the financial crisis are examples of MMLR. We consider “aggressive” and “conservative” MMLR policies. The aggressive policy supports the unique pareto optimal equilibrium. The conservative policy, which embeds a “no-bailout constraint,” only supports an inefficient equilibrium.
33587.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个受到非基本面冲击的经济体中的市场非流动性。资产交易通过分散的一对一讨价还价进行。该模型存在多个理性预期均衡；我们将某些帕累托较劣的均衡与流动性危机联系起来。政府可以通过充当“最后做市商”（MMLR），以高于市场的价格购买资产来改善福利。美国在金融危机期间采用的几项政策就是MMLR的例子。我们考虑了“激进型”和“保守型”MMLR政策。激进型政策支持唯一的帕累托最优均衡。保守型政策包含“不救助约束”，仅支持一个无效率的均衡。

33586.title: Uprootedness, Human Capital, and Skill Transferability
33586.zh_title: 流离失所、人力资本与技能可转移性
33586.authors: Stelios Michalopoulos, Elie Murard, Elias Papaioannou, Seyhun Orcan Sakalli
33586.abstract: More than a century has passed since the abrupt exodus of 1.2 million Greek Orthodox from Anatolia and their resettlement in Greece, a transformative event for the country’s social and demographic landscape. Today, more than one in three Greeks reports a refugee background. While its historical significance is well-documented, its short-, medium-, and long-term impact on human capital accumulation remains unexplored. How did forced displacement shape the educational trajectories of the uprooted and their offspring? Did refugees invest in portable skills to respond to uncertainty, or did they struggle to catch up with the autochthonous? To address these questions, we trace the educational investments of refugees and their descendants over the last 100 years, leveraging granular census data and a comprehensive mapping of both their origins in Anatolia and their settlements in Greece. The analysis provides compelling support for the uprootedness hypothesis. Though initially lagging, refugees settling in the Greek countryside eventually outperformed nearby natives in educational attainment. Their university choices also diverged, with refugees’ lineages favoring degrees transferable beyond the Greek labor market, such as engineering and medicine, and natives specializing in law and other fields with a strong home bias. Exploring additional mechanisms reveals the critical role of linguistic barriers and local economic conditions in shaping these outcomes, rather than the refugees’ pre-migration economic background. The widespread educational gains of refugees and their descendants over four generations offer some hope that the ongoing surge of forced displacement, despite its tragedy, if properly addressed by the international community, can be a backbone of economic resilience for the affected communities.
33586.zh_abstract: 自120万希腊东正教徒突然从安纳托利亚流亡并在希腊重新定居以来，已过去一个多世纪，这一事件对希腊的社会和人口格局产生了变革性影响。如今，超过三分之一的希腊人报告有难民背景。尽管其历史意义已有充分记载，但其对人力资本积累的短期、中期和长期影响仍未得到探索。强制流离失所如何塑造了流离失所者及其后代的教育轨迹？难民是投资于可转移技能以应对不确定性，还是努力追赶本地居民？为了回答这些问题，我们利用精细的人口普查数据以及对他们在安纳托利亚的原籍地和在希腊定居点的全面地图绘制，追溯了难民及其后代在过去100年间的教育投资。分析为流离失所假说提供了令人信服的支持。尽管最初落后，但定居在希腊乡村的难民最终在教育成就上超过了附近的本地人。他们的大学选择也存在差异，难民的后代更倾向于选择在希腊劳动力市场之外也可转移的学位，如工程和医学，而本地人则专攻法律和其他具有强烈本土偏好的领域。探索其他机制揭示了语言障碍和当地经济状况在塑造这些结果中的关键作用，而非难民迁移前的经济背景。难民及其后代在四代人中广泛的教育收益提供了一些希望：尽管存在悲剧，但如果国际社会妥善应对，当前持续的强制流离失所浪潮可以成为受影响社区经济韧性的支柱。

33585.title: The Evolution of Inflation Targeting from the 1990s to the 2020s: Developments and Challenges
33585.zh_title: 从1990年代到2020年代通胀目标制的发展与挑战
33585.abstract: Since the initial launch of inflation targeting in the early 1990s in New Zealand and a few other countries, inflation targeting has become the predominant monetary policy strategy in large advanced and emerging market economies. Inflation targeting has been remarkably successful in anchoring inflation, likely owing to core elements of the framework across central banks. Its reaction process, which adjusts the monetary policy stance to ensure the return of inflation to target, allows it to flexibly incorporate a wide range of factors while limiting the discretionary biases that can contribute to excessive inflation. The emphasis on communications about the inflation outlook promotes transparency and accountability. As a result, inflation targeting central banks have, on balance, managed well the large shocks associated with the Global Financial Crisis and COVID. Even so, there are numerous challenges discussed in this paper that are associated with calibration and communications of forward guidance, quantitative easing/tightening, and financial stability.
33585.zh_abstract: 自20世纪90年代初新西兰和其他少数国家首次推出通胀目标制以来，它已成为大型发达经济体和新兴市场经济体中占主导地位的货币政策策略。通胀目标制在锚定通胀方面取得了显著成功，这很可能归功于各央行框架的核心要素。其反应过程——调整货币政策立场以确保通胀回归目标——使其能够灵活地纳入广泛因素，同时限制可能导致过度通胀的自由裁量偏差。强调关于通胀前景的沟通促进了透明度和问责制。因此，总体而言，实行通胀目标制的央行很好地管理了与全球金融危机和新冠疫情相关的巨大冲击。即便如此，本文讨论了与前瞻性指引、量化宽松/紧缩以及金融稳定相关的校准和沟通方面的众多挑战。
